Crossfire
programme.desc: Jonas ‘Malo’ Moldanado (Curtis ‘50 Cent’ Jackson) is a fresh faced recruit in the NYPD, taken under the wing of a corrupt police chief Sarcone (Robert DeNiro) Malo get dragged deeper and deeper into a world of drugs, violence and crime.

programme.title: High Heat
programme.desc: When the local mafia shows up to burn down her restaurant, Ana, a chef with a meticulous past, defends her turf and proves her knife skills both in and out of the kitchen.

programme.title: The Legend Of Hercules
programme.desc: In the epic origin story the legend of Hercules, a half-god, half-man blessed with extraordinary streng. Betrayed by his stepfather, the king, and exiled and sold into slavery because of a forbidden love, Hercules must use his formidable powers.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former protégé to flush out the real culprit.

programme.title: The Mortal Instruments: City of Bones
programme.desc: Clary Fray thinks she is just an ordinary teenager living in Brooklyn, but everything changes one night when in a downtown club she encounters the mysterious and charismatic Jace , and witnesses a shocking murder.

programme.title: The Cannonball Run
programme.desc: A group of competitors participates in a wild, illegal car race across America, where the drivers use every dirty trick in the book to win.

programme.title: Miracles: The Canton Godfather
programme.desc: A country boy becomes the head of a gang through the purchase of some lucky roses from an old lady. He and a singer at the gang's nightclub try to do a good deed for the old lady when her daughter comes to visit.

programme.title: Tracers
programme.desc: It’s a race for survival in the criminal underworld of New York in the action-packed thriller TRACERS.

programme.title: Hours
programme.desc: When his beloved wife dies in childbirth, Nolan (Paul Walker) is left to care for their newborn on his own while Hurricane Katrina simultaneously devastates the coast of Louisiana.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: Director Simon West and Nicolas Cage team-up for the first time since the 1997 blockbuster CON AIR for STOLEN, a unique fast paced action thriller that takes place during 10 frantic hours on Mardi Gras day in New Orleans.

programme.title: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Five young people find themselves stranded in Moscow, fighting to survive in the wake of a devastating alien attack.

programme.title: Righteous Kill
programme.desc: The story begins with highly decorated Detectives Turk and Rooster of the NYPD facing a retirement which neither of them are ready for. Before they can hang up their badges, they are called to investigate the murder of a notorious pimp, who appears to have ties to a case they solved years before.

programme.title: American Sicario
programme.desc: Based on the true story of America's most dangerous drug trafficker "La Barbie"; Edgar Valdez, drug lord and cartel leader, works with the Feliz brothers.

programme.title: Gunner
programme.desc: When ruthless drug traffickers kidnap his children, ex-special forces operative Lee Gunner embarks on a violent life-or-death mission. With his unique skills and nothing to lose, he'll take on an army to bring his family home.

programme.title: Breaker! Breaker!
programme.desc: Truck driver searches for his brother, who has disappeared in a town run by a corrupt judge.

programme.title: Elektra
programme.desc: From the pages of Marvel Comics — creators of X-Men and Spider-Man — comes ELEKTRA, the first action-event movie of the year. In the ultimate battle between good and evil stands a warrior who makes the choice that tips the balance.

programme.title: Miracles: The Canton Godfather
programme.desc: A country boy becomes the head of a gang through the purchase of some lucky roses from an old lady. He and a singer at the gang's nightclub try to do a good deed for the old lady when her daughter comes to visit.

programme.title: Snitch
programme.desc: In the fast-paced action thriller SNITCH, Dwayne Johnson stars as a father whose teenage son is wrongly accused of a drug distribution crime and is looking at a mandatory minimum prison sentence of 10 years.

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: A thriller centered on a young man who sets out to uncover the truth about his life after finding his baby photo on a missing persons website.

programme.title: Hours
programme.desc: When his beloved wife dies in childbirth, Nolan (Paul Walker) is left to care for their newborn on his own while Hurricane Katrina simultaneously devastates the coast of Louisiana.

programme.title: There Be Dragons
programme.desc: Two childhood friends become separated by the political turmoil of pre-war Spain only to find themselves on opposite sides when the war erupts. One becomes a priest, the other is an activist who becomes a spy for the fascist movement. As the battles are waged, the characters' lives collide...

programme.title: The Cannonball Run
programme.desc: A group of competitors participates in a wild, illegal car race across America, where the drivers use every dirty trick in the book to win.

programme.title: The Twisters
programme.desc: Dozens of deadly tornadoes converge in the Midwest, merging into a mega twister set to obliterate everything for hundreds of miles.

programme.title: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Five young people find themselves stranded in Moscow, fighting to survive in the wake of a devastating alien attack.

programme.title: The Expatriate
programme.desc: When former CIA agent Ben Logan finds himself suddenly targeted for termination by the Agency, he is propelled into a frenzied, action-packed race against the clock for his life, with the only person left who wants or needs him alive: the 15 year-old daughter he barely knows.

programme.title: Gun Shy
programme.desc: The story follows Turk Henry; a mega platinum rock star who's married to a supermodel and rich beyond his wildest dreams. Whilst on holiday, his wife is mysteriously abducted by a group of renegade, ship-less pirates.

programme.title: Eliminators
programme.desc: Martin Parker (Scott Adkins), a highly trained former DEA agent, is hiding in the witness protection program in London with his young daughter, Carly. His world is turned upside down when a group of thugs break into his home looking for hidden contraband.

programme.title: The Mortal Instruments: City of Bones
programme.desc: Clary Fray thinks she is just an ordinary teenager living in Brooklyn, but everything changes one night when in a downtown club she encounters the mysterious and charismatic Jace , and witnesses a shocking murder.

programme.title: The Twisters
programme.desc: Dozens of deadly tornadoes converge in the Midwest, merging into a mega twister set to obliterate everything for hundreds of miles.

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: A thriller centered on a young man who sets out to uncover the truth about his life after finding his baby photo on a missing persons website.

programme.title: Tracers
programme.desc: It’s a race for survival in the criminal underworld of New York in the action-packed thriller TRACERS.

programme.title: Hours
programme.desc: When his beloved wife dies in childbirth, Nolan (Paul Walker) is left to care for their newborn on his own while Hurricane Katrina simultaneously devastates the coast of Louisiana.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: Director Simon West and Nicolas Cage team-up for the first time since the 1997 blockbuster CON AIR for STOLEN, a unique fast paced action thriller that takes place during 10 frantic hours on Mardi Gras day in New Orleans.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former protégé to flush out the real culprit.

programme.title: Tracker
programme.desc: Set in 1903, Tracker is a tense action thriller in which Arjan (Ray Winstone), a guerrilla survivor of the South African Boer War, lands in colonial New Zealand and is promised a huge bounty to capture Kereama (Temuera Morrison), a Maori seafarer accused of killing a British soldier.

programme.title: The Last Legion
programme.desc: As the Roman empire collapses, young Romulus Augustus must leave the city and set out for a dangerous journey to Britain to locate his last legion of supporters.

programme.title: Jane Got a Gun
programme.desc: JANE GOT A GUN is the story of Jane Hammond, a young mother living in a secluded ranch on the vast New Mexico prairie. When her family’s life is threatened by a conniving gang of outlaws led by the nefarious John Bishop (McGregor).

programme.title: Hyena Road
programme.desc: Three different men, three different worlds, three different wars – all stand at the crossroads of modern warfare. It's a murky world in which they must save lives - but all is not as it seems

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.desc: Chad Michael is a mannequin fanatic. His collection of over 300 mannequins has taken over every room of his house. Zizi has 35 carrot tattoos and she’s decorated every room with a carrot theme.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.sub-title: S1:E8 Airline Addict & Crazy for Capybaras
programme.desc: Anthony has been collecting aviation memorabilia since he was 5. Melanie is crazy about her pet capybara, Gari, taking him for walks and teaching him tricks.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.desc: My Crazy Obsession: Christmas Collection takes you inside the lives of extreme collectors who have taken holiday decorating to the max. For these obsessed collectors, it's Christmas year round.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: S4:E1 Addicted to Coffee Enemas / Licks Cats
programme.desc: Trina and her husband Mike have done nearly 7,000 coffee enemas over the last two and a half years. Lisa has been addicted to licking her cat and eating clumps of its hair for three years.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: S4:E2 Extreme Hair / Addicted to Bee Stings
programme.desc: Asha hasn't cut her 21-foot long hair in nearly a quarter century and spends up to six hours a day grooming her ten-pound locks. Margaret has stung herself over 50,000 times with bees.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: S4:E3 Addicted to Inflatables / Butt Injection Addict
programme.desc: Mark has been addicted to his 15 inflatable pool toys, eating with them, sleeping with them and even bathing them. Karmello has been getting black market butt injections for the last three years.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: S4:E4 In Love With Balloons / Face Mask Eater
programme.desc: Julius has been sexually attracted to balloons for decades and keeps more than fifty thousand in his home at all times. Natasha eats entire jars of clay face masks every day.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.sub-title: S2:E1 Love Bunnies & World's Strongest Family
programme.desc: The Best family is so obsessed with their own strength that they spend countless hours lifting weights. Candace and Steve's collection of bunny items has reached nearly 30,000 pieces.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.sub-title: S2:E2 This Little Piggy & All Dolled Up
programme.desc: Sharon’s collection of pig items has exceeded 6,000 and adorns almost every square inch of her home. Rebecca’s obsession with Barbie dolls includes styling her own hair and wardrobe to match her dolls.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.sub-title: S1:E3 House of Dolls & Flashback to the '50s
programme.desc: Bob and Lizzie share their home with over 250 love dolls, and love to flaunt their collection around town. Doris Mayday is in her 20’s and stuck in the 50’s. Everything about Doris is from 1950.

programme.title: Programming will resume shortly
programme.desc: We're catching up on our beauty sleep! Stay tuned for more priceless entertainment curated by Rakuten TV.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: S3:E2 Drinks Nail Polish / Ear Digger
programme.desc: Bertha has been drinking up to five bottles of nail polish every day for the past five years but her family is worried she's doing permanent damage to her health. Jamie can't stop digging in her ears

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: S3:E3 Dating My Car / Baby Powder Addict
programme.desc: Nathaniel has been in a relationship with his car for nearly five years, taking it out on dates, buying it gifts, and even getting intimate with it. Jaye has been addicted to snorting baby powder.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: S3:E4 Addicted to My Breasts / Tape Eater
programme.desc: Sheyla has spent $250,000 on 22 breast enlargement surgeries to achieve her 38KKK bust size, despite suffering a severe infection from her recent implants. Andrea is addicted to eating adhesive tape.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.desc: My Collection Obsession takes you deep inside the world of four of the country’s most obsessed collectors each taking their material obsession to jaw-dropping extremes.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.desc: Pat and Joe are passionate about their extreme collection of over 5,000 infamous kid dolls. Kitty Kay Sera is completely obsessed with the color pink. She even wears pink clothes and eats pink food.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.desc: Janet has spent the last 30 years collecting over 5000 famous mouse memorabilia items and her collection holds the world record. Tamis has been obsessed with wearing wigs for the past 20 years.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.desc: Casie has been so shocked by the sudden death of her husband, Shawn, that she takes his urn everywhere she goes. But she has now started eating his ashes.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.desc: In this one-hour special, we revisit six of our addicts whose stories shocked the world. Tune in for exclusive never before seen footage in this special episode.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.sub-title: S2:E5 Greg Dreams of Jeannie & the Amazing Squirrel
programme.desc: Greg’s obsession with 60’s pop-culture has literally taken over his home. Kelly’s life revolves around her pet squirrel, Sugar Bush and his photo appearances

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.desc: Bugs have been a part of David’s daily diet for over twelve years, watch as he braces himself to eat his most venomous bug yet. Kelly’s daily diet consists of food solely gathered from the dumpster.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: S5:E1 Pony Play / Addicted to Drinking Paint
programme.desc: For the past 20 years, Nicole has been addicted to Pony Play. Meanwhile, 43-year-old single mother of two Heather has been addicted to drinking paint for nearly three years.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: S5:E2 Identical Twin Obsession / Eats Mattresses
programme.desc: Twins Amy and Becky are addicted to being identical, looking alike, acting alike, and even weighing their meals to stay the same size. Jennifer is addicted to eating mattresses.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.desc: Lacey, a 44-year-old mother of six has had at least 30 plastic surgery procedures and spent more than $250,000 building the most extreme body in the world.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: S5:E4 Chews Dirty Diapers / Addicted to Leeches

programme.title: Cesar Millan's Leader of the Pack

programme.title: Cesar Millan's Leader of the Pack
programme.desc: Dog behaviorist Cesar Millan searches for a new "pack leader" and permanent home for Rosie, a Staffordshire bull terrier who has been in and out of shelters and has developed some bad habits.

programme.title: Cesar Millan's Leader of the Pack
programme.desc: A big and beautiful but unruly Labrador crossbreed needs a confident leader who can control his explosive, puppy-like energy and obsessive behavior and give him a home.

programme.title: Cesar 911

programme.title: Cesar 911
programme.desc: Cesar Millan is in Singapore, where he's been asked to help a dog named Yoshi. Yoshi has been so aggressive towards other dogs that his owners have kept him locked up in their apartment for a year.

programme.title: Cesar 911

programme.title: Cesar 911

programme.title: Dog Nation

programme.title: Dog Nation

programme.title: Energy market fallout from US-Israel strikes on Iran
programme.desc: Oil markets brace for a shock as the joint US-Israeli strikes against Iran risks disrupting the global supply of crude oil. CGTN host Lincoln Humphries talks to experts to analyze the conflict's impact on global oil supply, the repercussions of the Strait of Hormuz closure and the broader implications on international energy prices, global supply chains, and the world economy.

CGTN host Lincoln Humphries talks to experts to analyze the conflict's impact on global oil supply, the repercussions of the Strait of Hormuz closure and the broader implications on international energy prices, global supply chains, and the world economy.

programme.title: Energy market fallout from US-Israel strikes on Iran
programme.desc: Oil markets brace for a shock as the joint US-Israeli strikes against Iran risks disrupting the global supply of crude oil. programme.title: I'm Still Here
programme.desc: Academy Award-winner Casey Affleck takes a turn behind the camera to document a tumultuous year in the life of fellow Oscar-winning actor, Joaquin Phoenix, as he announces his retirement from a successful film career and sets off to reinvent himself as a hip-hop musician.

programme.title: Lemon
programme.desc: Isaac is a man in free fall immobilized by mediocrity. His career is going nowhere. His blind girlfriend of ten years is leaving him. And his overbearing family doesn't help matters. What did he do to deserve this? Things were supposed to work out differently for him. Isaac Lachmann had big dreams.

programme.title: Plus One
programme.desc: Longtime single friends Alice & Ben agree to be one another's plus ones as they power through an endless parade of hilarious and insufferable weddings

programme.title: Programming will resume shortly
programme.desc: We're catching up on our beauty sleep! Stay tuned for more priceless entertainment curated by Rakuten TV.

programme.title: Vampires Suck
programme.desc: Becca, an anxious, non-vampire teen, is torn between two boys. Before she can choose, Becca must get around her controlling father, who embarrasses Becca by treating her like a child. Meanwhile, Becca’s friends contend with their own romantic issues, all of which collide at the prom.

programme.title: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: Undercover Agent Malcolm Turner is back and this time he's out to expose the suspected designer of a deadly computer "worm" that would allow outside forces access to sophistical and critical government intelligence files.

programme.title: Bogus
programme.desc: When a young boy's mother dies, he invents an imaginary friend to accompany him to his new home far away. How can a boy be lonely with a gentle giant named Bogus? Gerard Depardieu and Whoopi Goldberg star together for the first time in this warmhearted tale of magic and fantasy.

programme.title: Barbershop
programme.desc: Calvin (Ice Cube) is a would-be entrepreneur with big plans...and running his family's barbershop isn't one of them. But when he impulsively sells the shop to a shady loan shark, he soon realizes just how important the neighborhood parlor is to him... and just how far he'll go to get it back!

programme.title: Smother
programme.desc: After being fired from his job, an everyday guy faces pressure from his wife about having a baby, while having to deal with his suffocating mother, who has decided to move in with the couple.

programme.title: Life or Something Like It
programme.desc: The perfect world of a beautiful Seattle television reporter is shattered by the prediction of her death in seven days.

programme.title: The Bounce Back
programme.desc: A relationship guru and best-selling author finds himself falling for the licensed therapist who questions his methods.

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: When an engaged romance novelist is teamed with a Navy man as research for her latest book, she is taken aback by his boisterous personality and egotistical nature.

programme.title: Mother's Day
programme.desc: There are only a few days left before the Mother’s Day, as several families have to come to terms with how they’ll be spending the big day.

programme.title: Cheap Thrills
programme.desc: Craig loses his low-wage job. He heads to a bar and encounters an old friend. The two are roped into a round of drinks by a wealthy couple who engages them in a series of innocent dares in exchange for money. It seems like easy and much needed money, but how far are they willing to go for money?

programme.title: A Little White Lie
programme.desc: When a handyman living in New York City is mistaken for a famous and famously reclusive writer, he's brought to a university where he is to deliver a keynote address to save the school's literary festival.

programme.title: Walk of Shame
programme.desc: After losing an audition for her dream job, Meghan Miles, a Los Angeles TV news anchor, goes out for an uncharacteristic night of partying.

programme.title: Just Getting Started
programme.desc: An action comedy in the vein of MIDNIGHT RUN about an ex-FBI agent (Jones) and an ex-mob lawyer in the witness protection program (Freeman) having to put aside their petty rivalry on the golf course to fend off a mob hit.

programme.title: Programming will resume shortly
programme.desc: We're catching up on our beauty sleep! Stay tuned for more priceless entertainment curated by Rakuten TV.

programme.title: Made In America
programme.desc: When Zora Mathews goes searching for her biological, anonymous sperm donor father, she and her Afro-centric mother Sarah are dumbfounded to discover Hal Jackson, an obnoxious used car salesman on late-night TV; and worse than that, he’s white.

programme.title: As of Yet
programme.desc: Told entirely through video calls and digital diaries, Naomi navigates a problematic roommate and a burgeoning romance all while locked down during the Coronavirus pandemic.

programme.title: Life or Something Like It
programme.desc: The perfect world of a beautiful Seattle television reporter is shattered by the prediction of her death in seven days.

programme.title: Cooking with Love
programme.desc: Hardworking & optimistic television producer, Kelly, doesn’t have time for love. Along with her mentor Amanda, Kelly dives into another season of the Little Gourmet, a kids cooking show, when hot-headed Chef Stephen is dropped into Kelly’s life as a last minute replacement host.

programme.title: Father of Invention
programme.desc: Robert Axle (Kevin Spacey of AMERICAN BEAUTY, HORRIBLE BOSSES), an eccentric inventor-turned-egomaniacal-infomercial-guru, loses it all when one of his inventions maims thousands of customers.

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: FBI agent Malcolm Turner is known best for being a brilliant, master of disguise. Malcolm's latest assignment sends him to small-town Georgia, where he's assigned to trap a brutal bank robber who the FBI suspects will be coming down to visit his ex-girlfriend Sherry and her son.

programme.title: The Winning Season
programme.desc: Sam Rockwell and fast rising star Emma Roberts, comes the hilarious story of a washed up basketball coach who must learn to overcome his love of booze.

programme.title: And So It Goes
programme.desc: A self-absorbed realtor enlists the help of his neighbor when he's suddenly left in charge of the granddaughter he never knew existed until his estranged son drops her off at his home.

programme.title: The Bounce Back
programme.desc: A relationship guru and best-selling author finds himself falling for the licensed therapist who questions his methods.

programme.title: Lemon
programme.desc: Isaac is a man in free fall immobilized by mediocrity. His career is going nowhere. His blind girlfriend of ten years is leaving him. And his overbearing family doesn't help matters. What did he do to deserve this? Things were supposed to work out differently for him. Isaac Lachmann had big dreams.

programme.title: Everything Must Go
programme.desc: After delivering an inspiring presentation to his sales staff, Nick is fired for falling off the wagon one last time. He returns home to discover his wife has left him, changed the locks on their suburban home and dumped all his possessions out on the front yard.

programme.title: Heathers: The Musical
programme.desc: Based on the 1989 cult classic film starring Winona Ryder and Christian Slater, and recorded live in its original London home, The Other Palace.

programme.title: Ride the Eagle
programme.desc: Leif (Jake Johnson) inherits a picturesque log cabin when his estranged mother Honey (Susan Sarandon) dies. But there is a condition; he must first complete her elaborate to-do list.

programme.title: Programming will resume shortly
programme.desc: We're catching up on our beauty sleep! Stay tuned for more priceless entertainment curated by Rakuten TV.

programme.title: Barbershop
programme.desc: Calvin (Ice Cube) is a would-be entrepreneur with big plans...and running his family's barbershop isn't one of them. But when he impulsively sells the shop to a shady loan shark, he soon realizes just how important the neighborhood parlor is to him... and just how far he'll go to get it back!

programme.title: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: Undercover Agent Malcolm Turner is back and this time he's out to expose the suspected designer of a deadly computer "worm" that would allow outside forces access to sophistical and critical government intelligence files.

programme.title: The Grand Seduction
programme.desc: Brendan Gleeson is Murray, a once proud fisherman who now, along with his former colleagues in the harbour of Tickle Head are out of work and forced to live off welfare.

programme.title: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: Two strangers who drunkenly got married in Vegas fight over a huge jackpot after having their annulment denied by a judge.

programme.title: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: Big Momma is back — and this time he has big backup: his teenage stepson Trent (Brendan T. Jackson). Martin Lawrence returns as FBI agent Malcolm Turner and as Turner’s deep-cover alter-ego Big Momma.

programme.title: Barbershop 2: Back In Business
programme.desc: The buzz is back in Barbershop 2. Calvin is struggling to keep his father's shop alive, this time against urban developers looking to replace "mom & pop" establishments with name-brand chains. The world changes, but some things never go out of style...

programme.title: The Spy Next Door
programme.desc: Former CIA spy takes on his toughest assignment to date: looking after his girlfriend's three kids.

programme.title: Bogus
programme.desc: When a young boy's mother dies, he invents an imaginary friend to accompany him to his new home far away. How can a boy be lonely with a gentle giant named Bogus? Gerard Depardieu and Whoopi Goldberg star together for the first time in this warmhearted tale of magic and fantasy.

programme.title: The Hustle
programme.desc: Josephine Chesterfield (Anne Hathaway) is a glamorous, seductive Brit with a penchant for defrauding gullible wealthy men. Into her well-ordered world bursts Penny Rust (Rebel Wilson), an Aussie who is as free-form and fun-loving as Josephine is calculated and cunning.

programme.title: God Help The Girl
programme.desc: GOD HELP THE GIRL is a coming of age tale set in Glasgow over the course of one hazy summer. Written, directed and with original songs by Stuart Murdoch, lead singer of the group Belle and Sebastian, GOD HELP THE GIRL is a story of a young girls problems entering adult life.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.sub-title: S01 : E43 Search for Our Sun's Lost Planet
programme.desc: Is it possible that there is a hidden planet within our own solar system? New evidence suggests that the fabled Planet X, or Planet 9, may indeed exist… but where?

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.sub-title: S01 : E53 Saturn: The Moon King
programme.desc: The latest developments in space technology continue to reveal the wonders of our solar system. With new moons recently spotted orbiting Saturn, the gas giant has taken the lead in our cosmic neighborhood's moon count.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.sub-title: S01 : E56 Mars Perseverance: The Hunt Begins
programme.desc: Watch as the Mars Perseverance Rover makes its historic landing on the Red Planet. We take you inside the harrowing February 18, 2021 landing and its science mission.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: This is an inside look at NASA's groundbreaking Artemis Program, the spacecraft, and the people who will bring humanity one step closer to the moon, Mars, and beyond.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.sub-title: S01 : E72 Capturing A Black Hole In Our Milky Way
programme.desc: Astronomers linked radio dishes around the world to create the “Event Horizon Telescope” and have utilized this tool to photograph a supermassive black hole.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.sub-title: S01 : E74 First Images: The James Webb Telescope
programme.desc: The dawn of a new era in astronomy has begun as the world gets its first look at the full capabilities of NASA’s James Webb Space Telescope.

programme.title: Bright Now
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 Sailing to the Stars
programme.desc: Solar sails, the latest in space travel technology, could one day help us reach nearby stars. Follow the exciting missions laying the ground towards a new form of space exploration.

programme.title: Bright Now
programme.desc: On the 50th Anniversary of Apollo 13, Commander Jim Lovell and Apollo engineers recall the ingenuity and superhuman efforts that turned a space flight disaster into an extraordinary fight for survival.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: NASA's Parker Probe Plus is on a mission to learn more about the Sun -- flying through dangerous radiation to become the closest spaceship to orbit our Sun.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Opportunity: A Life on Mars
programme.desc: This year we said goodbye to one of our most intrepid planetary explorers, the Opportunity rover. Take a look back at its storied 15-year mission on Mars.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: A non-profit organization established in 2011 is aiming to land the first Israeli spacecraft on the Moon. This is the story of their attempt and the excitement of being the first private company to have a spacecraft launched with the intention of going to and landing on the moon.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Modern Day Killer Asteroid
programme.desc: 66 million years ago, an asteroid slammed into Mexico’s Yucatán Peninsula, causing a dinosaur mass extinction. What's in store for humanity if it happens again?

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: Hayabusa2 just became the first spacecraft to take subsurface samples of an asteroid. How did they do it?

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.sub-title: S01 : E43 Search for Our Sun's Lost Planet
programme.desc: Is it possible that there is a hidden planet within our own solar system? New evidence suggests that the fabled Planet X, or Planet 9, may indeed exist… but where?

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.sub-title: S01 : E53 Saturn: The Moon King
programme.desc: The latest developments in space technology continue to reveal the wonders of our solar system. With new moons recently spotted orbiting Saturn, the gas giant has taken the lead in our cosmic neighborhood's moon count.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.sub-title: S01 : E56 Mars Perseverance: The Hunt Begins
programme.desc: Watch as the Mars Perseverance Rover makes its historic landing on the Red Planet. We take you inside the harrowing February 18, 2021 landing and its science mission.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: This is an inside look at NASA's groundbreaking Artemis Program, the spacecraft, and the people who will bring humanity one step closer to the moon, Mars, and beyond.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.sub-title: S01 : E72 Capturing A Black Hole In Our Milky Way
programme.desc: Astronomers linked radio dishes around the world to create the “Event Horizon Telescope” and have utilized this tool to photograph a supermassive black hole.

programme.title: The History of Home Narrated by Nick Offerman
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 The Foundations of Home - Structure and Shelter
programme.desc: The History of Home is a story that is ever-changing, constantly being renovated and built upon. As homes changed, so too did our lives.

programme.title: The History of Home Narrated by Nick Offerman
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 The Hall, The Kitchen, The Dining Room, The Living Room
programme.desc: Now that we've reviewed the fundamentals of shelter - the past, present, and future of materials - it's time to step over the threshold and find out who is home.

programme.title: The History of Home Narrated by Nick Offerman
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 The Second Story - Private Life
programme.desc: In the final episode, The History of Home will focus on private life by exploring the history of three rooms; The study, the bedroom, and the bathroom.

programme.title: The History of Home Presents... History's Greatest Homes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 The Rich & The Royal
programme.desc: From the Rhode Island coastline to the Forests of France, what unites the rich and the royal is a love of a grand home.

programme.title: The History of Home Presents... History's Greatest Homes
programme.desc: In this episode, we get an up-close and personal look as we pull back the curtain on the fascinating history behind one of America’s most iconic homes, Hearst Castle.

programme.title: The History of Home Presents... History's Greatest Homes
programme.desc: Take a journey back in history as we explore the fascinating story of Hampton Court Palace and the scandals of its most infamous resident, King Henry VIII.

programme.title: The History of Home Presents... History's Greatest Homes
programme.desc: Welcome to one of the most important homes in American history. Thomas Jefferson’s Monticello. We’ll explore inside and out to find out more about this unique home.

programme.title: The Miseducation of Cameron Post
programme.desc: After being caught with another girl in the back seat of a car on prom night, Cameron is shipped off to a conversion therapy centre that treats teens "struggling with same-sex attraction".

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: Eric Lomax was one of thousands of Allied prisoners of war forced to work on the construction of the Thai/Burma railway during WW2. Years later, he met Patti and fell in love. Discovering that the young Japanese officer who haunted her husband was still alive, she faced a terrible decision.

programme.title: I Am Woman
programme.desc: The story of Helen Reddy, who in 1966 landed in NYC with her three-year-old daughter, a suitcase and $230 in her pocket. Within five years she was one of the biggest superstars of her time, and an icon of the 1970s feminist movement.

programme.title: Programming will resume shortly
programme.desc: We're catching up on our beauty sleep! Stay tuned for more priceless entertainment curated by Rakuten TV.

programme.title: Loving Vincent
programme.desc: Vincent Willem van Gogh is undoubtedly one of the most famous and influential figures in the history of Western art. Yet during his lifetime Vincent struggled with poverty and depression, dying at only 37 years old.

programme.title: Emperor
programme.desc: EMPEROR is a gripping tale of love and honour forged between fierce enemies of war, a story inspired by true events, of the bold and secret moves that won peace in the shadows of postwar Japan.

programme.title: Finding Altamira
programme.desc: 1879, nine-year-old Maria Sautuola and her father, Marcelino, discover the first cave art and accomplished paintings of galloping bison. But Maria's mother, devout Conchita, is disturbed at the idea that prehistoric savages could have created such magnificent art.

programme.title: My All American
programme.desc: Freddie Steinmark, an underdog on the gridiron, faces the toughest challenge of his life after leading his team to a championship season.

programme.title: The Beaver
programme.desc: Two-time Academy Award winner Jodie Foster directs and co-stars with two-time Academy Award winner Mel Gibson in The Beaver - an emotional story about a man on a journey to re-discover his family and re-start his life.

programme.title: A Perfect Day
programme.desc: Benicio del Toro & Tim Robbins star in this war zone comedy where a band of rescue workers are confronted with a crisis.

programme.title: Waiting for Anya
programme.desc: From the mind of world-renowned author Michael Morpurgo comes the cinematic adaptation of Waiting for Anya - a powerful and authentic true story of a young shepherd that had a key part to play in one of the world's most shocking moments in history.

programme.title: Rules Don't Apply
programme.desc: An aspiring young actress and her ambitious young driver struggle hopefully with the absurd eccentricities of the wildly unpredictable billionaire Howard Hughes, for whom they work.

programme.title: God's Own Country
programme.desc: Johnny Saxby (Josh O'Connor) works long hours on his family's remote farm in the north of England. He numbs the daily frustration of his lonely existence with nightly binge-drinking at the local pub and casual sex.

programme.title: Little Accidents
programme.desc: Both dramatic and suspenseful, Little Accidents shows the different ways in which people respond to tragedy.

programme.title: We Have Always Lived in the Castle
programme.desc: A twisted mystery based on the acclaimed novel by Shirley Jackson ('The Haunting of Hill House'). Merricat (Taissa Farmiga - 'The Nun') lives with her sister Constance (Alexandra Daddario - 'Baywatch') and her Uncle Julian (Crispin Glover - 'Back to the Future').

programme.title: The Party's Just Beginning
programme.desc: A darkly humorous and moving coming of age story written, directed and starring Karen Gillan.

programme.title: A Perfect Day
programme.desc: Benicio del Toro & Tim Robbins star in this war zone comedy where a band of rescue workers are confronted with a crisis.

programme.title: Con Man
programme.desc: The unbelievable true story of Barry Minkow, the youngest person ever to defraud Wall Street and who by the age of 21 was worth a staggering 100 million dollars.

programme.title: I Can Only Imagine
programme.desc: It's the song that brings ultimate hope to so many...often in the midst of life s most challenging moments.

programme.title: The War Below
programme.desc: During World War I, a group of British miners are recruited to tunnel underneath no man's land and set bombs from below the German front in hopes of breaking the deadly stalemate of the Battle of Messines.

programme.title: Waiting for Anya
programme.desc: From the mind of world-renowned author Michael Morpurgo comes the cinematic adaptation of Waiting for Anya - a powerful and authentic true story of a young shepherd that had a key part to play in one of the world's most shocking moments in history.

programme.title: Meek's Cutoff
programme.desc: In this acclaimed Western, travelling settlers find themselves stranded in harsh conditions and begin to turn upon each other.

programme.title: The Journey
programme.desc: After 40 years of "The Troubles" in Northern Ireland the leading players meet at St. Andrews to try and hammer out a final and lasting peace agreement.

programme.title: Rex
programme.desc: Rex is based on the true-life story of young Marine Corporal Megan Leavey whose unique discipline and bond with her military combat dog saved many lives during their deployment in Iraq.

programme.title: JFK
programme.desc: John F. Kennedy in Dallas, Texas, in 1963. What he learns leads him to suspect that there is more to the story than the public is being told.

programme.title: Waiting For The Barbarians
programme.desc: The Magistrate, administrator of an isolated frontier settlement on the border of an unnamed empire, looks forward to an easy retirement until the arrival of Colonel Joll, whose task it is to report on the activities of the 'barbarians' and on the security situation on the border.

programme.title: Ice Cream in the Cupboard
programme.desc: Carmen and Pat's marriage is turned upside down by a diagnosis of early onset Alzheimer's. As the time draws closer when Carmen will no longer recognize her husband, Pat finds refuge in his memories of their life together.

programme.title: Pelé: Birth of a Legend
programme.desc: This biographical drama chronicles the life of one of the world's greatest footballers.

programme.title: Magic Beyond Words
programme.desc: An inspiring look at JK Rowling's rise to become one of the most influential writers-from her humble beginnings, as an imaginative young girl and awkward teenager, to the loss of her mother and the genesis of the Harry Potter phenomenon.

programme.title: The Forger
programme.desc: A teenager wanders into Carmel, California, where he is soon introduced to the art-forgery community.

programme.title: Rex
programme.desc: Rex is based on the true-life story of young Marine Corporal Megan Leavey whose unique discipline and bond with her military combat dog saved many lives during their deployment in Iraq.

programme.title: Please Stand By
programme.desc: A young autistic woman runs away from her caregiver to boldly go and deliver her 500-page Star Trek script to a writing competition in Hollywood. On an adventure full of laughter and tears, Wendy follows the guiding spirit of Mr. Spock on her journey into the unknown.

programme.title: The Dresser
programme.desc: In this wickedly funny and moving story, Sir reflects on his accomplishments and seeks to reconcile his turbulent friendships with those in his employ before the final curtain.

programme.title: My All American
programme.desc: Freddie Steinmark, an underdog on the gridiron, faces the toughest challenge of his life after leading his team to a championship season.

programme.title: Pelé: Birth of a Legend

programme.title: The Believer
programme.desc: Ryan Gosling stars in the true story of an anti-Semitic skinhead who was revealed to be Jewish by a New York Times reporter.

programme.title: Filth
programme.desc: Bruce Robertson, a bigoted and corrupt policeman, is in line for a promotion and will stop at nothing to get what he wants. Enlisted to solve a brutal murder and threatened by the aspirations of his colleagues, Bruce sets about ensuring their ruin.

programme.title: R.A.D.A.R.: The Adventures of the Bionic Dog
programme.desc: A boy and his dog with bionic powers save a small town from two bumbling crooks.

programme.title: Barbie: Dreamtopia
programme.desc: Barbie's youngest sister Chelsea is entered into a local bike race by her friend, she is embarrassed about not being able to ride without training wheels. Inspired by Barbie's stories, Chelsea finds herself transported to the magical world of Dreamtopia, where her imagination runs wild.

programme.title: The Young and Prodigious T.S. Spivet
programme.desc: T.S is a 12 year-old prodigy with a passion for cartography and scientific inventions. One day, he receives an unexpected call from the Smithsonian museum telling him that he is the winner of a very prestigious prize.

programme.title: 100% Wolf
programme.desc: Freddy Lupin is the heir to a proud family line of werewolves. Desperate to become a werewolf himself, Freddy is in for a shock when on his 14th birthday his first transformation goes awry, turning him into a ferocious - poodle.

programme.title: A Tooth Fairy Tale
programme.desc: In a magical land divided by tradition, a rebellious tooth fairy and a daring goblin girl join forces on an epic quest to unite the kingdom!

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: Talia tries builds to build a perfect robot, “REX”, to win a Robot Festival competition… yet she still has to work on it. Auriana tries to help and makes it “perfect” (meaning a total hottie) with her magic. The evil twins curse the robot, turning it secretly evil, and making it the perfect spy.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: The princesses help the members of the band Quicksand Ferret, a band for whom they are the opening act. One of the members has disappeared, making them wonder… was it foul play?

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: Lolirock wants to promote their songs and meets a music video director at the smoothie bar. Iris and Auriana convince a dubious Talia to work with the eccentric director who insists that the girls remove their jewelry so his “pre-historic style” video can be “authentic.”

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: As a break from magic training, Lolirock goes to a concert in the desert featuring a hot new artist, DJ Ezra. Talia is instantly put off by the singer’s self-important attitude, but Auriana can’t shake the feeling that she’s met him before.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.sub-title: S2:E15 The Ruby Of The Orient
programme.desc: When Lolirock gets a new gig, they need to publicize it, so they find an artist named Debra to design flyers. Visiting Debra at her stately but dilapidated home, the Princesses learn that her family is enduring hard times and is in danger of losing their house.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: On a day when an eclipse on Ephedia causes the Princesses’ powers to go haywire, the girls take the day off and head to Nathaniel’s shop to grab a smoothie. There, they discover that another smoothie bar has opened up and is taking customers from Nathaniel’s place.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: Using a voice-imitating spell that makes her sound like Nathaniel, Mephisto and Praxina calls Talia and Auriana down to the smoothie bar, then uses the same spell to lure Iris to a deserted street where they attack her.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: While at the smoothie bar, Lolirock overhears a hipster (Mephisto in disguise) criticizing their on-stage dance moves. The girls take the criticism to heart, and on the way home, they stop in for a dance lesson at a studio run by a strict instructor named Svetlana.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: Lolirock is judging an amateur talent show when a nervous contestant named Mark completely bungles his magic act. After Iris’ pendant glows, the Princesses realize Mark is a person in need and try to calm his nerves and help him perfect his act.

programme.title: Firehouse Dog
programme.desc: Hollywood's most pampered pooch gets lost during a commercial shoot and ends up as the mascot for a local fire station.

programme.title: Free Birds
programme.desc: On a quaint, family-owned farm, a giant turkey flock lives a quiet, corn-stuffed life. All everyone cares about is feeding time and grazing in the sun and being in “Turkey Paradise.” Everyone, that is, except for Reggie, a whipsmart turkey who is an outcast among his flock.

programme.title: Adventure Mouse
programme.desc: Dreaming of adventure, city mouse Gamba joins a crew of Ship Mice ready to set sail - just as young Chuta bursts in, pleading for help. Stowing away on a boat, the gang heads for Dream Island to defend Chuta's family of mice against Noroi the White Weasel and his wicked weasel clan.

programme.title: Pets
programme.desc: Join beloved house pets Bella the cat, Bagel the dog, and the always-feisty Alvin the parrot, for another fun and fact-filled afternoon in front of the TV screen watching their favorite show: Pets! When these three buddies are on the couch itʼs always a madcap and memorable time!

programme.title: The Young and Prodigious T.S. Spivet
programme.desc: T.S is a 12 year-old prodigy with a passion for cartography and scientific inventions. One day, he receives an unexpected call from the Smithsonian museum telling him that he is the winner of a very prestigious prize.

programme.title: The Little Vampire
programme.desc: From the screenwriters of Chicken Run and The Addams Family, comes The Little Vampire: a fantastic adventure that you can really sink your teeth into!

programme.title: Alvin and the Chipmunks: Chipwrecked
programme.desc: The vacationing Chipmunks and Chipettes are turning a luxury cruise liner into their personal playground, until they become "chipwrecked" on a remote island.

programme.title: Tomorrow's Game
programme.desc: On the day of his Uncle's ascendance into the Hall of Fame, Daniel is forced to embark on a journey through time that sees him restore his family's legacy and rewrite baseball history.

programme.title: Sea Level
programme.desc: Pup, a bamboo shark, discovers egg sacs while playing around the ocean with his friends. When he sees human poachers stealing the eggs from his reef, Pup makes it his mission to save his family.

programme.title: Ratchet & Clank
programme.desc: Get ready for an action adventure of GALACTIC PROPORTIONS! Ratchet is the last of his kind, a foolhardy Lombax who grew up without a family. Clank is a pint-sized robot with more brains than brawn.

programme.title: Aliens in the Attic
programme.desc: An adventure/comedy about kids on a family vacation who must fight off an attack by knee-high alien invaders with world-destroying ambitions. At the same time the youngsters try to keep their parents in the dark about the battle upstairs.

programme.title: R.A.D.A.R.: The Adventures of the Bionic Dog
programme.desc: A boy and his dog with bionic powers save a small town from two bumbling crooks.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: The girls investigate an evil hair salon owner that is using a “special formula” to grow her clients’ hair to massive proportions (in order to make fabulous wigs). The only problem is, the formula is sucking the life out of the customers in the process.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: An evil villain shrinks himself down to microscopic size and enters Jerry’s body – controlling him and forcing him to do evil things. The girls have to go in after the villain to save not only to save their boss, but also the world. In a b-story, Alex has to dissect a frog in science class.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.sub-title: S2:E5 It's How You Play the Game
programme.desc: When the team from tropical Zanzibar begins sweeping the winter Olympics, the girls are sent in to investigate. What they discover is an evil coach who’s engineering super-athletes by injecting dangerous, performance enhancing hormones into their bodies!

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: The spies investigate a former beach bunny beauty queen who devises a device which selectively intensifies the sun’s rays on certain parts of the world – thereby, subjecting those people to severe heat and sun. The villain then sells her 2000 SPF sun block to those affected.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: When men all over the world abruptly and unexpectedly leave their wives, the spies are called-in to investigate. What they discover is Possession, a new French perfume created by Natalie Valentine. The perfume’s secret ingredient? Natalie Valentine’s pheromones.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.sub-title: S2:E8 Boys Bands Will be Boys Bands
programme.desc: The Spies investigate the hottest new pop band, Teensicle, when several band members begin to mysteriously disappear. When the band members resurface seemingly safe and sound, the spies detect strange changes in their personalities.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: When tsunamis begin to wipe out tourist spots/resort areas all over the world, WOOHP sends in the spies. What they discover is that the tsunamis are man made – an evil plot by ex-surfer Frankie Dude to restore the beaches to their natural state and original “surfability.”

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: It’s Mother’s Day and the spies decide to take their moms to an exclusive spa to celebrate. Once they get there, however, the girls notice that their moms have begun to act quite strangely. In fact, it quickly becomes apparent to the spies that their moms are trying to kill them!

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: When the children of the world start to disappear, the spies uncover a sinister television show and a host who is training the children to take over the adult world. In a b-story, Clover somehow has to complete her mission while being grounded to her bedroom.

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Heidi is based on the novel by Johanna Spyri. The film follows the adventures of Heidi, a young orphan girl, whose gift for happiness helps her when she is forced to leave the mountains for a new life in the city.

programme.title: Alvin and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: A struggling songwriter named Dave Seville finds success when he comes across a trio of singing chipmunks: mischievous leader Alvin, brainy Simon, and chubby, impressionable Theodore.

programme.desc: Live-action adaptation of the beloved story of a wooden puppet named Pinocchio who magically comes to life.

programme.title: Alvin and the Chipmunks: The Road Chip
programme.desc: Through a series of misunderstandings, Alvin, Simon and Theodore come to believe that Dave is going to propose to his new girlfriend in Miami... and dump them.

programme.title: Pets 2
programme.desc: Best buddies, Bella the laid-back cat, Bagel the goofy dog, and Alvin the opinionated parrot are hanging out on their cherished couch watching the best show on TV, Pets! Bella is particularly excited because today’s episode of Pets is all about the coolest and most mysterious pet around: the cat!

programme.title: Maya the Bee: The Golden Orb
programme.desc: When a bored Maya and Willi bust out of winter lockdown early, they are catapulted headfirst into a top secret mission! Entrusted with the care of a sacred seed, Maya and Willi team up with their old pal's Arnie and Barnie to deliver the seed to its new home atop the mysterious Bonsai Mountain.

programme.title: Pets
programme.desc: Join beloved house pets Bella the cat, Bagel the dog, and the always-feisty Alvin the parrot, for another fun and fact-filled afternoon in front of the TV screen watching their favorite show: Pets! When these three buddies are on the couch itʼs always a madcap and memorable time!

programme.desc: The world famous singing pre-teen chipmunk trio return to contend with the pressures of school, celebrity, and a rival female music group known as The Chipettes.

programme.desc: Freddy Lupin is the heir to a proud family line of werewolves. Desperate to become a werewolf himself, Freddy is in for a shock when on his 14th birthday his first transformation goes awry, turning him into a ferocious - poodle.

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Heidi is based on the novel by Johanna Spyri. The film follows the adventures of Heidi, a young orphan girl, whose gift for happiness helps her when she is forced to leave the mountains for a new life in the city.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: Auriana, Iris, and Lyna go to a farm to pick strawberries. Ricky, the son of the farm’s owner, tells them that unfortunately, the crop has failed this year – and he can’t figure out why. The Princesses’ magic reveals that whatever is beneath the ground is pure evil.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.sub-title: S2:E21 Stop In The Name of Lev Part I
programme.desc: Lara tells the girls she has set up a concert gig for them. Excited, Iris runs to tell Nathaniel, only to find him staring enraptured into Missy’s eyes. Hurt, Iris runs out, right into a battle with the Evil Twins. She drives them off, and finds she has just saved Lev!

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.sub-title: S2:E22 Stop In The Name of Lev Part II
programme.desc: As the vortex starts to close, Talia convinces Iris to wait until Talia contacts her sister Izira, head of the Resistance on Ephedia. But after a moment of confusion, the holographic Izira confirms everything in the King’s message: Iris, and only Iris, must return to help the King.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: Gramorr sends the Twins two crystal amulets that, used in tandem, can turn an opponent to stone. Meanwhile, Carissa scoffs at soccer, so Iris and Talia take Carissa to watch the Sunny Bay Suns practice.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: During a battle with the Princesses, Praxina angrily cast a powerfull spell to blast the princesses. The Princesses conjure a shield that protects them, and Mephisto vanishes – but the impact knocks out Praxina.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: Izira appears in a hologram with good news: One more gem and they will finaly restore the crown of Ephedia! Carissa and Lyna are with Izira – they’ve already been called home. And now Iris reveals to Auriana and Talia that Aunt Ellen has secretly been an Ephedian all along.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: Nathaniel brings flowers to Iris... but is crestfallen to see all of Aunt Ellen’s moving boxes, Iris told him she was moving, but not so soon ! Iris tells him she wanted to be his girlfriend more than anything, and wants them to enjoy whatever time they still have together.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: Iris and the Princesses go on tour to help Ellen’s friend Lara, a talent manager who has fallen on tough times… which is evident by the miserable tour bus they are forced to ride to their destinations. While they’re gone, Lyna and Carissa watch out for any trouble…

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: Mephisto and Praxina decide to get oracle gems the exact same way the princesses do, by helping people. But they’re lousy at it… and decide to make a monster that will put people in danger, thus requiring those people to be “helped”.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.sub-title: S03 : E03 The Norman Conquest of Pembrokeshire
programme.desc: Tony traces the Norman conquest of this part of Wales, which still feels more English than the rest of the country, nearly 1000 years later.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.sub-title: S03 : E04 Nazi Occupation: The Channel Islands
programme.desc: For five years, the Channel Islands were occupied by Nazi Germany. Here, Tony traces the still-visible story of the occupation.

programme.title: Digging For Britain
programme.sub-title: S07 : E01 Vindolanda and WWII Spitfire
programme.desc: The team search for remains of the crashed WWII Spitfire and discover parts of the cockpit.

programme.title: Digging For Britain
programme.sub-title: S07 : E02 Roman Bathhouse and Hessian Camp
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts investigates British archaeology, joining up the results of digs and investigations the length and breadth of the country.Alice Roberts shares archaeological discoveries from the west of the UK, including the biggest maritime excavation since the Mary Rose, a Roman bath house and a German camp.

programme.title: Deep Water Salvage
programme.desc: As Arctic conditions continue to wreak havoc in British Columbia, Jeremy Birch is tasked with raising a concrete-hulled vessel.

programme.title: Deep Water Salvage
programme.desc: Phil Risko’s team at Northstar work fast to refloat a trawler that’s been blown onto the shore. At the mouth of the Demerara River, Guyana, Dutch Salvage company works blind to chop up and clear a sunken wreck that’s a navigational hazard.

programme.title: SEX: A Bonkers History
programme.desc: With Dr James Whitworth, Dan finds out how sex was used during WW2 to motivate the troops through saucy cartoons. Amanda dresses up as the biggest icon of the century, Marilyn Monroe, while Dan also plays dress-up to explore Elvis Presley’s allure.

programme.title: SEX: A Bonkers History
programme.desc: Dan and Amanda explore how attitudes towards sex differed drastically before the intervention of Christianity. Dan travels to the Chelsea Physic Garden to make Egyptian equivalent of Viagra and Egyptian spermicide. Amanda trains as a Spartan woman.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson winds back the clock to 1940 for a walk along Dorset's Jurassic Coast, revealing the county's World War II role as the frontline against Hitler.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 The Birth Of Industry
programme.desc: Tony heads out on a 40-mile walk through the wild, dramatic and romantic Peak District - the place where the Industrial Revolution began.

programme.title: Digging For Britain
programme.sub-title: S04 : E01 Stonehenge and Celtic Rituals
programme.desc: Alice Roberts and Matt Williams visit sites in the west of Britain, including one uncovering the rituals of Stonehenge

programme.title: Digging For Britain
programme.sub-title: S04 : E02 The Battle of Waterloo
programme.desc: Alice Roberts and Matt Williams present more outstanding archaeology. The team unearths a mass grave and search the Thames for clues to a 17th century tragedy

programme.title: Deep Water Salvage
programme.desc: Phil Risko’s team at Northstar work fast to refloat a trawler that’s been blown onto the shore. At the mouth of the Demerara River, Guyana, Dutch Salvage company works blind to chop up and clear a sunken wreck that’s a navigational hazard.

programme.title: Al Murray: Why Does Everyone Hate The British Empire?
programme.desc: Al Murray is joined by Kevin Kropinery. Uncover the truth about Captain Cook and how the first cricket legends were Aboriginal. Hitting the high notes of controversy along the way by butting in on topical issues is Al Murrays comedic alter ego.

programme.title: River Hunters
programme.desc: Presenter Rick Edwards and US YouTube sensation and river detectorist Beau Ouimette travel to Warwick on the hunt for incredible archaeological finds.

programme.title: Concerto - OSN Luisi Malofeev Torino 2021
programme.desc: In May 2021, pianist Alexander Malofeev joined conductor Fabio Luisi and the Orchestra Sinfonica Nazionale della Rai for a performance at Turin's Auditorium RAI Arturo Toscanini. The program featured Franz Liszt's Piano Concerto No. 1 in E-flat major and Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky's Symphony No. 6 in B minor, "Pathétique." Malofeev's interpretation of Liszt's concerto was particularly noted for its expressive depth and technical prowess.

programme.title: MED Destination KEFALONIA
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Whats On Italy Tradition and Trends
programme.sub-title: Whats On Italy Tradition and Trends
programme.desc: At the heart of the Mediterranean, Italy’s event calendar comes alive through the Mediterranea Metal Cruise at sea, the innovation-driven SIGMA Rome, the Med Film Festival and MedFilm Festival celebrating Mediterranean cinema, and the Cous Cous Fest, where food becomes a symbol of cultural exchange.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Med Nations 14 Cyprus
programme.desc: Cyprus, the eastern jewel of the Mediterranean, a land of legends and resilience shaped by many civilizations.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Med Destinations Ancona
programme.desc: Explore Ancona, a bustling port city on the Adriatic, with Med Destinations. Discover its historic landmarks, scenic waterfronts, and the unique blend of maritime tradition and modern Italian life.

programme.title: Split (Firule)
programme.desc: In Split’s Firule neighborhood—home to Croatia’s tennis greats—we discovered more than just sport. Renowned chef Hrvoje Zirojević welcomed us with a taste of tradition: pivac na tingul, a classic Dalmatian stew made with tender young rooster.

programme.title: Whats On Malta Skies and Sea
programme.sub-title: Whats On Malta Skies and Sea
programme.desc: Malta’s event calendar blends food, music, innovation, and heritage, from the flavours of the Malta International Food Festival to the electronic energy of Glitch Festival. Spectacle takes to the skies at the Malta Air Show, creativity and gaming converge at PlayCon Malta, and history comes alive at Birgu by Candlelight, where the city’s streets are illuminated by tradition and atmosphere.

programme.title: MedMinds 04 Leonardo
programme.desc: Leonardo da Vinci, the curious mind of the Renaissance, embodied genius with an insatiable thirst for discovery.

programme.title: Med Nations 14 Cyprus
programme.desc: Cyprus, the eastern jewel of the Mediterranean, a land of legends and resilience shaped by many civilizations.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Barcelona
programme.desc: Barcelona, Spain, is a city close to Malini's heart. Returning after her student years, she retraces old steps to see how the city has changed. Barcelona, one of Europe’s most visited cities, still holds centuries-old charm. Malina's old haunts include El Gòtic, Sant Antoni, Passeig de Gràcia, and Barceloneta. visits Gaudí’s iconic Casa La Pedrera, and discovers the new wave of creative tapas restaurants in El Raval, a once run-down quarter now bursting with energy.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Just south of Naples, we'll experience the breathtaking Amalfi Coast, including trendy Positano, the limoncello charms of Sorrento, the ancient Greek temples at Paestum, and the Blue Grotto hidden beneath the enchanting Isle of Capri.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: Step into a world of fresh flavors with a zesty tuna sandwich loaf loaded with crisp veggies and herbs, followed by a luscious banana Swiss roll layered with creamy pastry filling.

programme.title: MED Destination ANTIPAROS
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Med Destinations Pula
programme.desc: Discover Pula, Croatia, with Med Destinations. Famous for its Roman amphitheater and charming old town, Pula combines historical grandeur with Adriatic seaside beauty.

programme.title: Med Nations 05 Morocco
programme.desc: Morocco, the western gate of the Mediterranean, where tradition and diversity shape a nation of enduring strength.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ancona
programme.desc: Explore Ancona, a bustling port city on the Adriatic, with Med Destinations. Discover its historic landmarks, scenic waterfronts, and the unique blend of maritime tradition and modern Italian life.

programme.title: Med Minds 07 Dali
programme.desc: Salvador Dalí, the eccentric Mediterranean visionary, turned his life into art and became one of history’s most unforgettable minds.

programme.title: MED Destination VENICE
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destination - Dubrovnik
programme.desc: WITH VO

Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: MED Destination ITHAKA

programme.title: Imotska krajina
programme.desc: Imotski, known for its stunning Red and Blue Lakes, draws nature lovers and active travelers alike. During a local marenda break, host Jurica Grbavac introduced us to regional flavors—pivca and pura, a true taste of Imotski tradition.

programme.title: Med Nations 05 Morocco
programme.desc: Morocco, the western gate of the Mediterranean, where tradition and diversity shape a nation of enduring strength.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: il pane, le torte, la pizza
programme.sub-title: il pane, le torte, la pizza
programme.desc: Accompany, contain, support: three key concepts defining Italy's iconic culinary creations—bread, cakes, and pizza. Bread, a fundamental staple, complements dishes while holding symbolic meaning. Savory pies, rooted in medieval tradition, have remained unchanged through centuries. Lastly, pizza, an ancient grain-based dish, achieved global fame after merging with tomatoes in Naples. Massimo Montanari leads us through this rich and flavorful journey.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Andalucia
programme.desc: Join Angelica Malini on an unforgettable journey through Andalucía, southern Spain’s most colorful and captivating region, as they explore Cordoba and Cadiz. Famous for flamenco, tapas, and stunning Moorish architecture, Andalucía’s rich history comes alive here. In Cordoba, the host marvels at the breathtaking Mezquita, a grand mosque turned cathedral. In Cadiz, an ancient Phoenician city, they soak in sweeping Atlantic views and a corniche with hints of North Africa. This episode immerses viewers in the culture, history, and vibrant spirit of one of Spain’s most enchanting regions.

programme.title: Property in the Med Gege Gatt Panel
programme.sub-title: Property in the Med Gege Gatt Panel
programme.desc: As artificial intelligence reshapes the property landscape, standing still is no longer an option. This panel explores how AI is transforming the Mediterranean real estate market—from predictive analytics and smarter valuations to automated design, marketing, and investment strategies that give early adopters a decisive edge. Beyond the tools, the discussion digs into what actually fuels AI: data, energy, infrastructure, and talent—and how these hidden drivers are redefining competition itself. By unpacking both the opportunities and the risks, this conversation reveals how forward-thinking developers, investors, and agencies can stay ahead in a market where technology is now as valuable as location.

programme.title: Origini
programme.sub-title: S01:E02 Tra Reggio e Messina lo Stretto necessario
programme.desc: Valentina Caruso and Francesco Gasparri explore the Strait of Messina, where unique underwater currents create an oceanic ecosystem within the Mediterranean. Diver Domenico Majolino and marine biologist Simona Ratti explain its natural wonders, while Vincenzo Annuario tells the story of the Cariddi ferry, reborn after serving in the navy. At the National Archaeological Museum of Reggio Calabria, we discover the legacy of Magna Grecia and the famous Riace Bronzes. The 1908 earthquake that devastated Messina and Reggio Calabria is commemorated at the Regional Museum of Messina with the exhibition "1908 City Museum".

programme.title: Concerto – OSN Gatti Bruckner Wagner Torino
programme.sub-title: Concerto – OSN Gatti Bruckner Wagner Torino
programme.desc: In January 2022, Daniele Gatti conducted the Orchestra Sinfonica Nazionale della Rai at the Turin Auditorium, performing Wagner’s "Parsifal" excerpts and Bruckner’s Symphony No. 9. The programme highlighted Wagner's meditative Prelude to Act III and Good Friday Spell, followed by Bruckner’s profound Ninth Symphony, marked by its emotional depth and unfinished final movement.

programme.sub-title: Whats On Italy Tradition and Trends

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.desc: Spain, a vibrant Mediterranean land of resilience, culture, and unshakable identity.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Here along the Côte d’Azur, we wander the sunlit promenades of Nice, catch whispers of fortunes changing hands at Monaco’s famed casino, and step inside the elegant villas once home to artists and heiresses.

programme.title: Bronzi di Riace il tesoro ritrovato
programme.sub-title: Bronzi di Riace il tesoro ritrovato
