programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: The Chevy, Ford Mustang and Corvette are automotive icons from America; they are popular with the members of the tuning and refining community.

programme.title: StreetWise
programme.desc: The new BMW One M Coupe from former race car driver Ralf Kelleners -- the KS1 RS; Toyota presents their TS 030 hybrid at the 24-hour race of Le Mans; Subaru's XV crossover stands out from the company's model range.

programme.title: StreetWise
programme.desc: The Mercedes-Benz S250 with a four-cylinder engine needs so little fuel that one could call this car a piggybank; the powerful Nissan 370 Z and Wiesmann GT MF5; the ADAC Eco Test.

programme.title: StreetWise
programme.desc: Featuring the Porsche Boxter and the Volkwagon Passat Alltrack.

programme.title: Mercedes Sprinter, 2018
programme.desc: The Mercedes Sprinter belongs to the class of commercial vehicles; the light transporter is the dream for every tradesman; the third generation Sprinter is sleeker, more modern and more variable than ever.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: The Pikes Peak Hill Climb of 1987: A different type of race in the mountains of Colorado, USA.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: Since 1934, the Grand Prix has been the most exciting and fascinating world championship in the world. With its state-of-the-art vehicles, with horsepower from the biggest brands, it never fails to wow its viewers.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: The International Championship for Manufacturers was a rally series which ran from 1970 - 1972.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: An iconic racing car and one of only 29 ever built, the Mercedes 300 SL lightweight makes its premiere drive at the Mille Miglia.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The three super cars from this episode promise more power and more elegance. Thanks to tuning company Kelleners Sport, the new BMW 640i Gran Coupe offers even more bite. Thanks to its beautiful equipment and additional legroom, the Maserati Quattroporte GTS encourages to travelling. Thanks to all-wheel drive, the Porsche 911 Carrera 4S offers more fun and more safety on critical terrain.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Test days at the legendary race track in France before the 90th Le Mans Race.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: At the 2013 Frankfurt Motor Show Porsche introduced the new 911 range. It includes the new Porsche 911 Turbo, which is the most powerful Porsche model yet. For 50 years Porsche has been making car drivers around the world very happy with its sports cars. In celebration of the anniversary Supercars takes a closer look at the past, present and future models of the Porsche 911.

programme.title: DreamCars
programme.desc: The BMW X5M, Audi Q7, Mercedes GLS and Porsche Cayenne Turbo are among the strongest and fastest SUVs in the world; sports utility vehicles made in Germany are the embodiment of technical perfection, superior performance and unique comfort.

programme.title: DreamCars
programme.desc: Packed with power, panache and charm, a diverse range of high-end SUVs from across the world shows how luxury comes in all sizes and shapes.

programme.title: DreamCars
programme.desc: Large American SUVs and pickups, such as the Cadillac Escalade and Ford Raptor, combine power with luxury; these vehicles represent a sense of adventure and unlimited possibility.

programme.title: Toyota MegaCruiser BXD10
programme.desc: The Toyota MegaCruiser BXD10 has its origins in the Japanese army; its shape won't win any beauty contests or achieve the best results in the wind tunnel, but this is not really the point with an SUV like this.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Showing viewers the real off-road lifestyle; a look at the first Rally Defender at Europe's biggest all-wheel drive exhibition.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: When winter is coming, you have a lot of advantages with an all-wheel vehicle; there is traction even when the road is slippery; for the driver, this means not only more safety, but also more fun behind the wheel.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Featuring the Subaru WRX STI.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The Arabella Classics is one of the most exclusive classic car rallies in Europe.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Stunt coordinator Domi and his team give everything for spectacular stunts.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: On the industrial site at the Fliegl Vehicle Company in Triptis, the heart of Thuringen.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Heavy equipment comes into use as a car has to crash at full speed into a pile of gravel.

programme.title: MotorStories
programme.desc: Die-hard Porsche fan Marco Wendlandt makes his dream of driving a 1984 Porsche 911 coupe come true.

programme.title: MotorStories
programme.desc: Marco takes his new Porsche 911 coupe to LA to meet world-famous Porsche enthusiast Magnus Walker, who welcomes him into his workshop and collection.

programme.title: MotorStories
programme.desc: On his journey to Las Vegas, Marco drops by Big Mike in the Apple Valley, a remote area in the High Desert of California; together they meet Big Mike's bizarre friends from the Lowdown Kustos family.

programme.title: BMW 503
programme.desc: The noble four-seater 503 convertible was one of BMWs most exclusive models in the 1950s; many international sports and movie stars and other wealthy customers were fond of this sporty luxury vehicle.

programme.title: Track Masters
programme.desc: While the drivers are out there doing test laps, take a behind-the-scenes look at what goes on in the pit lanes.

programme.title: Track Masters
programme.desc: The fourth race of the VLN season is regared as a dress rehearsal for the 24 hour race.

programme.title: Track Masters
programme.desc: A look at the 24 hour race, the Strong Man Run and the Tourist drivers.

programme.title: BMW 503
programme.desc: The noble four-seater 503 convertible was one of BMWs most exclusive models in the 1950s; many international sports and movie stars and other wealthy customers were fond of this sporty luxury vehicle.

programme.title: Small City Cars
programme.desc: Small city cars reflect the change of times regarding new technology and eco-awareness. In 2023, Mitsubishi presented the ASX as a hybrid. And: 40 years of Opel Corsa. We show its transformation from city car to urban e-vehicle.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Upper mid-range sedans have stood for decades as a perfect combination of luxury, technology, and performance. Ideal for families and long distances.

programme.title: Vive la Evolution
programme.desc: For decades, French cars have combined extravagant design and innovation. The DS brand represents luxury and cutting-edge technology from Citroen. Does this also apply to the DS4? And: we tested the Peugeot 408 crossover SUV in Spain.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Tucson is Hyundai's bestseller.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Exploring how Subaru's Boxer engine concept works in the Subaru XV model; Hyundai i30N vs. Volkswagen Golf GTI.

programme.title: Ignition GT
programme.desc: Ernest samples the updated Hyundai Tucson N-Line; Nissan introduces the Stealth Edition of Navara; Zee spends some time with the LDV T60 double cab.

programme.title: Buyer's Guide
programme.desc: We look for a reliable vehicle under R230,000; bakkies from Toyota, Ford, Isuzu and Nissan go head to head; is a Jeep Wrangler a good used purchase?

programme.title: Sold in 60 Seconds
programme.desc: Features a British sports cars classic, the Triumph TR6, going under the hammer.

programme.title: Petrol Heads
programme.desc: Sbu goes us inside the electrifying Gas Motor Show at Durban's Suncoast Casino; from custom builds and exhibits to a parking lot transformed into a high-octane drift and stunt playground.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Going on mountain cruises in a sports car; as super cars become more comfortable and suitable for travelling in spite of their ever-increasing performance, what would be the perfect sports car for taking on the Alps, the Lamborghini Aventador Miura Homage, the Ferrari 458 Speciale, the McLaren 570S or the Porsche 911 Turbo S?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: To drive yourself or to be driven: That's the question here. When it comes to the Bentley Mulsanne with extended wheelbase, one can be more delighted to sit in the back of the car. But what is the situation when it comes to the sporty Maserat?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Both compressor charging and naturally aspirated engines have their advantages and disadvantages. In the Chevrolet Corvette, buyers can pick either of them.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: If a dream garage were built, there would be a Rolls-Royce Phantom, and an Aston Martin DBS Superleggera, as well as the Audi RS4. A car for every occasion.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: In 2018, the Audi R8 Quattro Performance received an upgrade; the new version shared some of its aerodynamic features with the Lamborghini Huracán; the Porsche Macan S got a more powerful engine.

programme.title: Killer Cuts Of The 00s!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Killer Cuts Of The 00s!

programme.title: College Campus Rocks! 1995-2010

programme.title: Kings & Queens 2000-Now
programme.desc: Starting in the 00s, bow before the royal rock stage! Home to the best front men and leading ladies that the world of rock has produced!

programme.title: Monsters of Rock! 2000-2009
programme.desc: A definitive 6 hour marathon of 00s rock anthems in order! From Alien Ant Farm to The Arctic Monkeys, Fall Out Boy to The Foo Fighters, Weezer to the White Stripes.

programme.title: Heaven Vs Hell!
programme.desc: Which is the best way to truly rock? Climbing a stairway to Heaven or cruising down that highway to Hell? You decide!

programme.title: Party Rock Anthems!
programme.desc: Party pop rock anthems spanning 5 decades! From Queen, Kiss & Aerosmith to Blur, Paramore & The White Stripes.

programme.title: Rock Monsters! 2010-2019

programme.title: Rock's Most Streamed of the 00s!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Rock's Most Streamed of the 00s!
programme.desc: Mark Goodier with a countdown of bands & artists who've had one rock song that has been viewed over a billion times since the 00s.

programme.title: Knowing
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage stars in KNOWING, a gripping action-thriller of global proportions about a professor who stumbles on terrifying predictions about the future and sets out to prevent them from coming true. Rose Byrne and Lara Robinson also star in director Alex Proyas' riveting feature.

programme.title: Gosford Park
programme.desc: In 2001, Robert Altman (MASH, The Long Goodbye) took the unexpected step into Agatha Christie territory with Gosford Park, a murder-mystery whodunit set in an English country house starring a host of British acting greats and with an Oscar-winning screenplay by Downton Abbey creator Julian Fellowes.

programme.title: Joy Ride
programme.desc: Two brothers on a cross-Country driving trip make the mistake of playing a practical joke on a mentally deranged trucker, and pay dearly for the prank when he becomes a homicidal stalker.

programme.title: Waiting for you
programme.desc: Paul (Morgan) investigates his late father's increasingly disturbing past and becomes suspicious of the mysterious, melancholic, and possibly dangerous Madeleine (Ardant).

programme.title: Breaking Infinity
programme.desc: A scientific researcher who has become unstuck in time must figure out what happened to him and stop the coming end of the world.

programme.title: Dark Minds
programme.desc: A twisted psychological thriller about a man haunted by his past.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: The epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine.

programme.title: Con Man
programme.desc: The unbelievable true story of Barry Minkow, the youngest person ever to defraud Wall Street and who by the age of 21 was worth a staggering 100 million dollars.

programme.title: The Cat's Meow
programme.desc: In 1924, media mogul William Randolph Hearst gathered some of the world's best known personalities for a trip of his yacht that resulted in a still-unsolved, hushed-up murder.

programme.title: Snitch
programme.desc: In the fast-paced action thriller SNITCH, Dwayne Johnson stars as a father whose teenage son is wrongly accused of a drug distribution crime and is looking at a mandatory minimum prison sentence of 10 years.

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: Set in New Orleans, this is the story of a mysterious man, Nick Easter. Nick gets himself not only on the jury of a landmark case against a gun manufacturer, but as the foreman, in an attempt to influence the other jury members to vote a certain way.

programme.title: Fair Game
programme.desc: FAIR GAME is a riveting action-thriller based on the autobiography of real-life undercover CIA operative VALERIE PLAME (Naomi Watts), whose career was destroyed and marriage strained to its limits when her covert identity was exposed by a politically motivated press leak.

programme.title: 13 Sins
programme.desc: Elliot Brindle is an ordinary office worker who’s bright, bored and drowning in debt. He receives a phone call informing him that he’s on a hidden camera game show, where he must execute 13 tasks to receive a sum total cash prize of $6.2M...

programme.title: On the Line
programme.desc: A provocative radio host (Mel Gibson) must play a dangerous game of cat and mouse with a mysterious caller who has kidnapped his family.

programme.title: The Final Cut
programme.desc: In the future, a man with access to people's memories finds his life at risk when he discovers a dark secret.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Riveting Sci-Fi action-thriller Push is set in a deadly world of psychic espionage where the ability to move objects using only the mind, see the future, create new realities and kill without ever touching the victim can turn a person into a lethal weapon - or a target.

programme.title: Winter Ridge
programme.desc: A young detective is torn apart after his wife ends up in a coma. Unable to accept her condition, he throws himself into a manhunt chasing a serial killer whose motives are connected to his wife.

programme.title: Dark Minds
programme.desc: A twisted psychological thriller about a man haunted by his past.

programme.title: High Crimes
programme.desc: A woman's life becomes embroiled in a huge military cover-up when it's revealed her husband is not who he says he is.

programme.title: An Imperfect Murder
programme.desc: An Imperfect Murder is a cat and mouse thriller which will leave you guessing until the very end – staring Sienna Miller and Alec Baldwin.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: The epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine.

programme.title: Night Train
programme.desc: In this tightly crafted action thriller, a single mother struggling to survive agrees to run black market medical supplies in her legendary pick-up truck, "Night Train", with the FBI in hot pursuit.

programme.title: Peacock
programme.desc: John Skillpa, a quiet bank clerk living in tiny Peacock, Nebraska, prefers to live an invisible life. This might have to do with John’s secret: he has another personality no one knows about, a woman who each morning cooks him breakfast before he starts his day. Then, in a moment, everything changes.

programme.title: Dark Minds
programme.desc: A twisted psychological thriller about a man haunted by his past.

programme.title: Mob Land
programme.desc: A desperate and struggling family man robs a pill mill. However, when the theft turns violent, he finds himself hunted by both the police and the Dixieland mafia.

programme.title: On the Line
programme.desc: A provocative radio host (Mel Gibson) must play a dangerous game of cat and mouse with a mysterious caller who has kidnapped his family.

programme.title: A Dangerous Method
programme.desc: Drawn from true-life events, it takes a glimpse into the turbulent relationships between fledgling psychiatrist Carl Jung, his mentor Sigmund Freud and Sabina Spielrein, the troubled but beautiful young woman who comes between them.

programme.title: Bel Canto
programme.desc: A famous soprano (Julianne Moore) travels to South America to give a private concert at a party for a wealthy Japanese industrialist (Ken Watanabe).

programme.title: Amish Abduction

programme.title: Tangent Room
programme.desc: Trapped in a mysterious room with no escape, four brilliant minds race against time to prevent a cosmic collapse of the universe. They must learn to work together and solve the puzzle before it's too late.

programme.title: Tracker
programme.desc: Set in 1903, Tracker is a tense action thriller in which Arjan (Ray Winstone), a guerrilla survivor of the South African Boer War, lands in colonial New Zealand and is promised a huge bounty to capture Kereama (Temuera Morrison), a Maori seafarer accused of killing a British soldier.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear Shorties
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Selfie / Dance, Dance / Roller-Skater / Modern Art / Picnic

programme.title: Masha and the Bear Shorties
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Come on Let's Share / Stylish Swim / Traffic Blues / February / March

programme.title: Wish Upon
programme.desc: When Clare's dad gifts her an old music box with an inscription that promises to grant the owner's wishes, she thinks there is nothing to lose. Clare makes her first wish and, to her surprise, it comes true. Before long, she finally has it all: money, popularity and her dream boy.

programme.title: Tokarev
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage stars in this action-packed thriller as Paul Maguire, a reformed criminal living a simple life as a family man and husband. But Paul is about to discover you can never truly outlive your sins.

programme.title: What Remains
programme.desc: When a long-term inmate at a mental clinic in Scandinavia confesses to a series of brutal murders on the eve of his release, his therapist, a police officer, and the inmate himself set out to reconstruct the details of the case and comprehend the murky reality that emerges.

programme.title: Programming will resume shortly
programme.desc: We're catching up on our beauty sleep! Stay tuned for more priceless entertainment curated by Rakuten TV.

programme.title: Shattered Earth. Cloudy Mountain
programme.desc: A peaceful town turns into a living hell when a devastating earthquake is triggered, causing buildings to tumble and sinkholes to open. A retired railway soldier and his son, an explosives engineer, travel deep into a cave to rescue trapped survivors.

programme.title: Made In America
programme.desc: When Zora Mathews goes searching for her biological, anonymous sperm donor father, she and her Afro-centric mother Sarah are dumbfounded to discover Hal Jackson, an obnoxious used car salesman on late-night TV; and worse than that, he’s white.

programme.title: High Crimes
programme.desc: A woman's life becomes embroiled in a huge military cover-up when it's revealed her husband is not who he says he is.

programme.title: Pelé: Birth of a Legend
programme.desc: This biographical drama chronicles the life of one of the world's greatest footballers.

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Elliot Richards is a hapless young man consumed by unrequited love, and desperate to change his life, he makes a deal with the Devil who slyly promises to do just that - for a price.

programme.title: Hamlet
programme.desc: Ian McKellen stars in the classic tale of revenge that has stood the test of time, reimagined for the modern day as a psychological thriller.

programme.title: The Ex
programme.desc: A slacker is forced to work for his father-in-law after his pregnant wife steps away from her high-paying job.

programme.title: Guess Who
programme.desc: A sarcastic father (Bernie Mac) has plenty to say about his daughter wanting to marry a white boy (Ashton Kutcher).

programme.title: Lizzie
programme.desc: LIZZIE is a dark, psychodrama based on the infamous 1892 axe murder of the Borden family in Fall River, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Say When
programme.desc: Megan (Keira Knightley) panics when her boyfriend proposes and hides out in the home of her new teenage friend Annika (Chloë Grace Moretz).

programme.title: Wish Upon
programme.desc: When Clare's dad gifts her an old music box with an inscription that promises to grant the owner's wishes, she thinks there is nothing to lose. Clare makes her first wish and, to her surprise, it comes true. Before long, she finally has it all: money, popularity and her dream boy.

programme.title: Cleaner
programme.desc: Crime thriller starring Samuel L. Jackson as Tom Cutler, a former cop who now works as a professional crime scene cleaner. When he's called to sanitise a suburban home after what appears to be a routine homicide, Tom later discovers he may have unknowingly helped cover up a murder.

programme.title: Donovan's Echo
programme.desc: Donovan Matheson is a man trapped in the past. Once an esteemed physicist, he worked on the Manhattan Project but in the years that followed, he became engulfed in regret, which soon turned into an obsession with finding a way to use his work to do good.

programme.title: Encounter
programme.desc: A group of friends make a remarkable discovery in a rural field - a crashed spacecraft - And there's a survivor. But when they bring the otherworldly being home, they soon discover that it holds even greater secrets than they could imagine.

programme.title: The Heist
programme.desc: It was a stroke of genius, but now the perfect crime is turning into a perfect disaster.

programme.title: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: Undercover Agent Malcolm Turner is back and this time he's out to expose the suspected designer of a deadly computer "worm" that would allow outside forces access to sophistical and critical government intelligence files.

programme.title: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: Big Momma is back — and this time he has big backup: his teenage stepson Trent (Brendan T. Jackson). Martin Lawrence returns as FBI agent Malcolm Turner and as Turner’s deep-cover alter-ego Big Momma.

programme.title: Pelé: Birth of a Legend
programme.desc: This biographical drama chronicles the life of one of the world's greatest footballers.

programme.title: Hamlet
programme.desc: Ian McKellen stars in the classic tale of revenge that has stood the test of time, reimagined for the modern day as a psychological thriller.

programme.title: Lars and the real girl
programme.desc: Extremely shy Lars strikes up an unconventional relationship with a doll he finds on the Internet. On the advice of a doctor, his family and neighbours go along with his delusion.

programme.title: Winter Ridge
programme.desc: A young detective is torn apart after his wife ends up in a coma. Unable to accept her condition, he throws himself into a manhunt chasing a serial killer whose motives are connected to his wife.

programme.title: Love After Love
programme.desc: An uplifting story of love after loss. Following the death of a college professor, a wife and son explore new beginnings.

programme.title: What Remains
programme.desc: When a long-term inmate at a mental clinic in Scandinavia confesses to a series of brutal murders on the eve of his release, his therapist, a police officer, and the inmate himself set out to reconstruct the details of the case and comprehend the murky reality that emerges.

programme.title: The Girl Next Door
programme.desc: A young man is smitten with the beautiful girl who moves in next door, and then discovers she is an ex-porn star.

programme.title: All The Devil's Men
programme.desc: Jack Collins (Milo Gibson), a former Navy SEAL turned bounty hunter, tracks down terrorists in missions so hazardous that the CIA outsources them to private companies.

programme.desc: We're catching up on our beauty sleep! Stay tuned for more priceless entertainment curated by Rakuten TV.

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Sexy Manhattanite Ashley is known as the luckiest woman around, but after a chance romantic encounter with down-and-out Jake, she realizes that she's swapped her fortune for his.

programme.title: Lars and the real girl
programme.desc: Extremely shy Lars strikes up an unconventional relationship with a doll he finds on the Internet. On the advice of a doctor, his family and neighbours go along with his delusion.

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: FBI agent Malcolm Turner is known best for being a brilliant, master of disguise. Malcolm's latest assignment sends him to small-town Georgia, where he's assigned to trap a brutal bank robber who the FBI suspects will be coming down to visit his ex-girlfriend Sherry and her son.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E26 Back to Battle City — Part 2
programme.desc: The four-way duel continues with Joey determined to duel Marik in order to save Mai while Marik and Kaiba both intend to face Yugi. Meanwhile, Ishizu reflects on her past.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E27 Back to Battle City — Part 3
programme.desc: With the conclusion of the four-way duel, the match-ups for the semi-finals are determined — Joey will duel Marik while Yugi will be facing off against Kaiba.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E28 The Darkness Returns — Part 1
programme.desc: Marik brings Joey and himself to the Shadow Realm, where each duelist's heart is linked with his monsters, suffering the pain that the monsters feel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E29 The Darkness Returns — Part 2
programme.desc: Marik's duel tactics eat away at Joey's deck and his life points. Joey's comeback strategy, however is hindered by Marik's new monster on Joey's side of the field.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E25 The Fortune Cup Finale, Part 1
programme.desc: The Duel between Yusei Fudo and Jack Atlas in the Fortune Cup can begin. During the Duel, Jack remembers what drove him to go to New Domino City with Yusei's old Duel Runner and the "Stardust Dragon" card in the first place.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 The Fortune Cup Finale, Part 2
programme.desc: The Duel between Yusei Fudo and Jack Atlas heats up. Even though the Signers are transported into the past that is related to the Crimson Dragon, Jack is still determined to win the Duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E27 A Web of Deceit, Part 1
programme.desc: Yusei, winner of the Fortune Cup and the appearance of the Crimson Dragon, catches the interest of the media and the mysterious organization, called the Dark Signers. One of these Dark Signers challenges Yusei to a Duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E28 A Web of Deceit, Part 2
programme.desc: Yusei Fudo continues his Duel with the man with the spider mark. His opponent reveals himself to be a Dark Signer. The reporter Carly Carmine tries to get a scoop as she watches the Duel. Meanwhile the other Dark Signers influence people to stand with them in their fight against the Crimson Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 Good Cop, Bad Cop
programme.desc: After his Duel with Grady, Yusei is willingly arrested by Trudge and Sector Security. Meanwhile, Carly, disguised as a nurse, tries to interview Jack at the hospital. Possessed by the Spider mark, Trudge appears and challenges Jack and Carly to a Duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.desc: Crow steals a number of Decks at a Security warehouse and plans his escape on a Duel Runner. Meanwhile, Goodwin tells Yusei about the Dark Signers, and Mina and Trudge look into Jack's disappearance.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.desc: Yusei has managed to reunite with his friend Crow Hogan, who tells him about some disturbance coming from the inner part of Satellite. Meanwhile, Jack Atlas and Carly Carmine spend the day at an amusement park, unaware that they are being followed by Mina and Trudge.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.desc: Yusei, Crow, Rally and the others meet together at Daedalus Bridge, Crow's hideout and Crow tells them the story of the legendary man of Daedalus Bridge. Meanwhile, in town, a baffling incident involving the Nazca Lines disappearing has occurred. Yusei sets his eyes on the backwoods of Satellite, the B.A.D. Area, so he can come face-to-face with a Dark Signer, namely Kalin Kessler, who seems to know Yusei very well.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.desc: Yusei, Crow, Rally and the others meet together at Daedalus Bridge, Crow's hideout and Crow tells them the story of the legendary man of Daedalus Bridge. Meanwhile, in town, a baffling incident involving the Nazca Lines disappearing has occurred. Yusei sets his eyes on the backwoods of Satellite, the B.A.D. Area, so he can come face-to-face with a Dark Signer, namely Kalin Kessler, who seems to know Yusei very well.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.desc: The Dark Signer Kalin Kessler is revealed to be an old friend of Yusei Fudo back in Satellite. However, for some unknown reason, he holds a deep hatred towards Yusei, Crow and Jack. To make matters worse, he has joined the Dark Signers whose plan is to destroy the world. Now, in order to settle things straight, Yusei and Kalin engage in a Duel while using the great picture as a stage.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.desc: The Dark Signer Kalin Kessler and Yusei Fudo continue their Duel. Kalin then Summons his trump card, the Dark Synchro Monster "One Hundred-Eyed Dragon", hoping to get rid of his former friend once and for all. Also, flashbacks are shown that reveal why Kalin hates his former team.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.desc: The Duel between Yusei and Kalin continues. Yusei Summons "Stardust Dragon" in order to defeat "One Hundred-Eyed Dragon". However, Kalin smirks and holds up another trump card, "Earthbound Immortal Ccapac Apu".

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.desc: Yusei is taken by Crow to Martha's refuge to treat his injuries from his Duel with Kalin. Meanwhile, Leo insists that the Signers should all collaborate to fight against the Dark Signers and suggests they contact Arcadia Movement in seek of Akiza's co-operation.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E30 The Darkness Returns — Part 3
programme.desc: With life points dropping and his monsters unable to attack, Joey summons a monster that proves to be his saving grace, prompting Marik to unleash Ra.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E31 The Darkness Returns — Part 4
programme.desc: Despite surviving Marik's onslaught, Joey is weakened by the shadow game's effects and succumbs just as he is about to win the duel. Yugi struggles to find hope after losing his best friend to the Shadow Realm.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The fearless bandit king Bakura has invaded the Pharaoh’s palace to take down the keepers of the seven Millennium Items single-handedly!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Even with the potent power of Obelisk the Tormentor, the Pharaoh couldn’t prevent the bandit Bakura from escaping!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S05 : E32 Makings of a Magician
programme.desc: Mahad vows to stop the bandit king Bakura’s sneak attacks once and for all, but he may have made a promise he can’t keep!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S05 : E33 Birth of the Blue-Eyes
programme.desc: Mahad, the first of the Pharaoh’s guardians, has fallen!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S05 : E34 Village of Lost Souls
programme.desc: The origins of the Millennium Items are revealed! Who forged these powerful artifacts, and why were they created?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S05 : E35 A Reversal of Fortune
programme.desc: The Pharaoh calls forth the mighty Egyptian God Slifer the Sky Dragon to fight the bandit Bakura’s Diabound.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S05 : E36 In Search of a King
programme.desc: The bandit Bakura has stolen the Millennium Puzzle and sent the Pharaoh plummeting into the abyss.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S05 : E37 Village of Vengeance, Part 1
programme.desc: Yugi and the Pharaoh are reunited, but the Pharaoh is powerless without the Millennium Puzzle!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S05 : E38 Village of Vengeance, Part 2
programme.desc: It’s the showdown in the sands between the bandit Bakura and his ever-growing Diabound versus the Pharaoh.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S05 : E39 Village of Vengeance, Part 3
programme.desc: With the help of his father’s spirit, the Pharaoh and his guardians defeated Bakura’s Diabound and stopped Zorc from resurrecting... or did they?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S05 : E40 Village of Vengeance, Part 4
programme.desc: The secret is out! The Pharaoh’s journey was more than a trip to the past – it’s the greatest Shadow Game ever created!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S05 : E41 Village of Vengeance, Part 5
programme.desc: Zorc’s incredible shadow energies have resurrected the bandit Bakura and his Diabound!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S05 : E42 Name of the Game
programme.desc: Karim is the next to fall under the bandit Bakura’s assault, and the ravaging robber won’t stop until he conquers the rest!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S05 : E43 The Dark One Cometh, Part 1
programme.desc: After a nearly eternal slumber, the all-powerful Zorc has resurrected, plunging the world into darkness!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S05 : E44 The Dark One Cometh, Part 2
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and his guardians are down to their last line of defense as Shada falls victim to Zorc!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S05 : E45 The Dark One Cometh, Part 3
programme.desc: Even Exodia the Forbidden One was unable to defeat Zorc!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S05 : E46 The Dark One Cometh, Part 4
programme.desc: The three Egyptian Gods have been defeated!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S05 : E47 In the Name of the Pharaoh
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and Kaiba’s combined strength couldn’t defeat Zorc!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pharaoh Atem, Yugi and friends have defeated the bandit Bakura and Zorc, but the final test still awaits! Yugi must duel... Atem!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S05 : E49 The Final Duel, Part 1
programme.desc: The time of destiny is now! Yugi vs. Atem!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S05 : E50 The Final Duel, Part 2
programme.desc: Atem has summoned all three Egyptian Gods!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S05 : E51 The Final Duel, Part 3
programme.desc: Not only does Atem still have all three Egyptian God Cards, Yugi doesn’t have a single monster on the field!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S05 : E52 The Final Duel, Part 4
programme.desc: Yugi and Atem – more than friends, closer than brothers.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Swing Into Action- Part 1
programme.desc: Yuya Sakaki aims to become an "Entertainment Duelist". He practices dueling every day alongside his childhood friend, Yuzu. One day, he receives a challenge for an exhibition match from the Pro Duelist, "Strong Ishijima". Although Yuya excitedly fends off his attacks in their Action Duel, he's eventually pushed into a corner.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Swing Into Action- Part 2
programme.desc: With The Sledgehammer set to strike, Yuya uses Pendulum power to swing the duel his way! Can this phenomenal new summoning method help Yuya hammer the Hammer?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: It could be curtains for Yuya when a rival student cons him out of his Pendulum Cards!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Still shocked by Sylvio's Pendulum Summon, Yuya must find his focus if he wants to save his friends from a 100-story drop!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: The new kid in town drives Yuya bananas when he begs Yuya to be his duel teacher! Unfortunately for Yuya, this blue-haired battler won't give up until Yuya gives in!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya's getting schooled by his wannabe student, Sora! Can Yuya turn things around and teach Sora a lesson about winning, or is Yuya's Pendulum power not going to make the grade?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Still steaming from his loss to Yuya, Sylvio looks to get some payback! But when Zuzu steps in to stop his plans, a mysterious stranger comes out of the shadows to show her how it's done!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: The Leo Institute is looking to take over Yuya's duel school, and they're bringing 3 of their most dangerous duelists to take down whoever dares stand in their way!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Dueling with the Stars
programme.desc: The battle to save Yuya's duel school goes galactic when Yuya faces off against Leo Institute's Dipper, an out-of-this-world duelist whose interstellar skills could have Yuya seeing stars!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: It's a gem of a duel when Zuzu faces a fierce Fusion Summoner whose jewel monsters are a cut above the rest! Can Zuzu and her Divas belt out a victory, or will the Leo Institute's diamond of a duelist force a final face-off?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: It's all up to Gong to save You Show from falling into the hands of the Leo Institute! Can Gong stare down defeat without moving his feet, or will a sword-swinging Syncro Summoner slice and dice his way to victory?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Battle Under The Big Top
programme.desc: It's a battle under the big top, but no one's clowning around! Yuya duels Declan to determine the fate of Yuya's duel school!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Declan has a surprise in store that could swing the duel his way! Can Yuya take down the best the Leo Institute has to offer, or will Declan's deck prove to be unbeatable?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: Yuya's down in the dumps, but Principal Boyle's not having it! Looking to snap Yuya out of his funk, Skip challenges Yuya to a duel to prove that the show must go on!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 In It To Win It
programme.desc: Still stinging from her defeat against the Leo Institute, Zuzu turns to an unlikely source for some assistance - Sora! But before her training can commence, a familiar looking stranger shows up, putting her lesson on hold!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: To gain eligibility to join the Junior Youth Championship, Yuya has to win 4 official duels consecutively. He ends up dueling is Michio Mokota, a cuisine Duelist with high popularity among the housewives.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E61 Truth and Consequences, Part 2
programme.desc: Sayer continues to manipulate Akiza in her Duel against Misty. Now, only Yusei can stop him by forcing him to reveal the truth about what really happened to Misty's brother the day of his death.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E62 Signs of Doom, Part 1
programme.desc: The King of the Netherworld arises from B.A.D. and approaches New Domino City. Rex Goodwin, who tries to use the powers of both a Signer and a Dark Signer to become a God, engages in a Turbo Duel with Yusei, Jack and Crow.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E63 Signs of Doom, Part 2
programme.desc: The Duel between Yusei, Jack, Crow, and Rex Goodwin continues. Rex Summons "Earthbound Immortal Wiraqocha Rasca" and uses its effect to reduce Crow's Life Points to 1. Due to massive injuries, Crow is unable to continue the Duel after falling off his Duel Runner.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E64 Signs of Doom, Part 3
programme.desc: Due to the effect of "Wiraqocha Rasca", Jack is blasted from the Duel. Now, only Yusei can save the world from Goodwin and stop the King of the Netherworld from reaching New Domino City.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Go With the Flow - Part 1
programme.desc: In Heartland, Yuma Tsukumo aspires to be the world's best Duelist. Despite this, he is not a good Duelist. When he ends up Dueling, Shark, a student known to have pro-level skills, odd things begin to happen and Yuma's story begins.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Go With the Flow - Part 2
programme.desc: The Duel between Yuma and Ryoga comes to its conclusion. In order to take down "Leviathan Dragon", Yuma obtains a "Number" monster of his own, "Utopia".

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 In the End - Part 1
programme.desc: Astral's been unable to leave since Yuma Dueled Shark, so, despite his reluctance, he's begun living with Yuma. At an inconvenient time, Akari Tsukumo has trouble when her PC she uses as a stay-at-home reporter crashes. When her big scoop is deleted as a result of a system down the city suffered, she orders Yuma to find an alternate scoop she can use for another manuscript. When Yuma goes into town, the traffic lights go nuts, causing downtown to fall into chaos. Yuma looks for the criminal who spread the computer virus that caused all this chaos.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 In the End - Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma challenges Professor Kitano, who is behind it all. Professor Kitano notes that each time he reduces his opponent's Life Points with "Electronic Computer-Beast Tera Byte" Astral's body weakens, causing him to slowly vanish! To make things worse, the Explosive Virus Time Bomb Ukyo has set is slowly reaching its countdown.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: A strange shadow approaches Yuma, which turns out to be Tokunosuke Omoteura, a classmate of Yuma's known for his duplicitous tongue. In the morning, Yuma was reprimanded for a prank he pulled in front of the whole class that he has no memory of causing. As a result, he's been cut off from every one else. Tokunosuke gently says "Let's Duel". With "Baby Tragon" his new Xyz Monster, Yuma might enjoy this duel, but Tokunosuke seems to be planning something.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: A strange shadow approaches Yuma, which turns out to be Tokunosuke Omoteura, a classmate of Yuma's known for his duplicitous tongue. In the morning, Yuma was reprimanded for a prank he pulled in front of the whole class that he has no memory of causing. As a result, he's been cut off from every one else. Tokunosuke gently says "Let's Duel". With "Baby Tragon" his new Xyz Monster, Yuma might enjoy this duel, but Tokunosuke seems to be planning something.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Tokunosuke steals Yuma's "Utopia", causing Astral to vanish. Tokunosuke wanted the great power of Numbers, and Yuma tries to Summon "Leviathan Dragon" to fight back, but Tokunosuke's Trap Card takes even that away. When Yuma is pushed into a corner with his field, an unexpected monster will become the Trump Card of the Duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: After having been around a while and having to work with Yuma, Astral's been fascinated by a TV Show Hero named "Different Dimension ESPer Robin". For some reason, Astral feels close and similar to this Robin from an alternate universe. One day, pictures show up with Robin in a fight downtown! Yuma, prodded by Astral, goes with Kotori to where the autographs were taken and meets Robin's actor, a kid named Fuya! But Fuya is a timid boy who doesn't resemble the Robin they all admire in the slightest.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: The mysterious person posing as Robin around town was Fuya. Under the intolerable strain of being a hero, Fuya's heart has been overcome by darkness Yuma challenges him to a Duel to save his soul. Robin, however, possesses "Number 83: Galaxy Queen". With it, he proceeds to summon one character after another from the TV Show. At first, Yuma and Astral were amused by this, but due to Galaxy Queen's almighty Monster Effect, they quickly grow impatient. To make things worse, Galaxy Queen, who currently possesses Robin, has taken on the appearance of Fuya's mother.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya faces a ferocious attack against Michio Mokota's Cooking Duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 Trapped in a Card
programme.desc: It's a case of mistaken identity when Yuya is eyed as the primary suspect for attacking Leo students! But when Yuya crosses paths with the real culprit, things go from bad to worse!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya matches minds with the quiz whiz extraordinaire Pierre L'Supérieure in a duel of wits! Can Yuya outsmart the smartest boy on Earth, or will Yuya end up scratching his head in defeat?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: In the finale of the mind-bending match that's part-duel, part-quiz show - one wrong answer could mean curtains for Yuya! Can he outduel and outthink a trivia whiz who's never wrong?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Duelists throughout the city are continuously being attacked, and everyone is on the search to find out the who, how and why!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 A Date With Fate - Part 1
programme.desc: Yuya's future takes a terrifying turn for the worse when he battles a fortunetelling foe who predicts this will be his last duel ever! Can Yuya fix his fate and avoid a devastating disaster, or has his luck finally run out?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 A Date With Fate - Part 2
programme.desc: As Yuya's battle against the fortunetelling predictress Aura flares to its finish, it becomes crystal clear that Yuya's danger-filled future is becoming a reality

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Let the games begin! The top duelists from around the globe have gathered together for the Arc League Championships to find out who's the best duelist in the world!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Allie is looking to make a big splash at the Arc League Championship, but she soon finds herself in over her head! Can Allie's deck of fishy friends turn the tides, or will her mysterious opponent sink her chances of winning?

programme.desc: Zuzu takes center stage in an epic rematch against Leo Institute's dueling diamond, Julia Krystal! Will Zuzu avenge her earlier loss and walk away a winner, or will history repeat itself and leave Zuzu singing the blues?

programme.desc: When Gong's old sparring partner sets a trap for Yuya, the only way Gong can save his friend is to forfeit his duel and get tossed from the tourney!

programme.sub-title: S01 : E32 The Pendulum Swings Both Ways - Part 2

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V

programme.desc: Yuya can't believe his eyes when he finds himself standing face-to-face-to-face with two lookalikes who are out to destroy each other... and everything in sight!

programme.desc: Yuya is in a coma, and nothing has been able to stir him from his terrifying state! Is Yuya down for the count, or will his duelmate's ESP and TLC make him A-OK?

programme.desc: Declan confronts Celina and shares a story from their past that reveals a frightening future!

programme.desc: While Yuya is looking to knock the competition out cold in the Volcano Zone, the Iceberg Zone is heating up as Zuzu and Gong team up to defrost their foes

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V

programme.desc: Sparks fly in the Volcano Zone when all our heroes face off against the full fury of Fusion Dimension's elite Obelisk Force! With more than life points on the line, the action has never been hotter!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Are friends now foes as Yuya and Sora go deck to deck in a fiery face-off?

programme.desc: When Yuya discovers Declan's web of lies put his friends in danger, he challenges Declan to a battle as payback!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: It’s a family feud when Yuya takes on his mom in a duel where there’s more to lose than just his allowance! Can Yuya avoid being run down by Paradise City’s most feared motorcycle momma?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: The battle between Yuya and his mom kicks into high gear! Can Yuya avoid being grounded, or will Loco Yoko put the pedal to the metal and throttle her way to victory?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: As Zuzu and Yugo try to unravel the riddle of Yuya's dimensional doubles, their sleuthing is cut short by Sector Security!

programme.desc: Zuzu and Yugo redline their Duel Runner in a high-stakes Turbo Duel with Sector Security! Can they outrun the long arm of the law, or will Security put the brakes on their escape?

programme.desc: When Yuya and his pals arrive in the Synchro Dimension, Sector Security is waiting for them with open arms… and cuffs! Can Yuya smooth things out before Sylvio and Celina put a wrinkle in his plan?

programme.desc: It’s a superheroic showdown in the Synchro Dimension pitting Super Gong against his arch-nemesis, Dennis the Destroyer!

programme.sub-title: S02 : E58 Scream for the Green
programme.desc: Dennis and Gong are in for the ride of their lives when they’re introduced to the turbo-charged world of underground motorcycle dueling!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: A suspicious shadow is trailing Yuma. It seems someone has been after Yuma, and their identity is the unassuming girl Cat-chan from Yuma's class. Yuma and Kotori fall into Cat-chan's trap. To rescue Kotori, he's going to have to Duel. Astral is cautious of the strange vibes he's getting from Cat-chan, especially with the strategy of her "Transforming Cat Deck"!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Yuma is reminded that his victories in his current Duels are due to Astral's help. To prove his skills, he fights Shark once more. Though Shark doesn't care to Duel again, he finally agrees when he finally reaches the end of his rope due to Yuma's constant following him around. The Duel of these two begins. Can Yuma win against Shark, who has no "Number" cards, when he himself declares he won't use his "Number" cards or take the aid of Astral!?After his Duel with Shark, Yuma Duels Tetsuo Takeda without "Numbers" and loses twenty times in a row, with Tetsuo angry because Yuma lied about not using the "Numbers" against Shark. Yuma is scolded by Astral on his immaturity. On the other hand,...

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: After his Duel with Shark, Yuma Duels Tetsuo Takeda without "Numbers" and loses twenty times in a row, with Tetsuo angry because Yuma lied about not using the "Numbers" against Shark. Yuma is scolded by Astral on his immaturity. On the other hand, Shark returns to "his place" where he gets involved with a criminal network. Yuma, who knew what was going on with Shark, challenges the two strongest thugs: Rikuo and Kaio, to what Shark proposes to be a 2 on 2 "Tag-Team Duel".

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Yuma finds himself pinned down by the overwhelming power of "Number 61: Volcasaurus". To protect their precious remaining Life Points, he defends Shark at his own expense. When their opponents summon their second Number monster at that point, Astral becomes aware of the hidden mysteries underlying the Duel. In a last-ditch effort, Shark notices Yuma's passion and entrusts him with 1 card that could turn the whole Duel around!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 The Number Hunter - Part 1
programme.desc: After a series of incidents, Yuma and Astral learn of the existence of a "Number Hunter". Astral remains wary of an unseen presence, but Yuma pretends not to care. As a result, a series of strange phenomena appear around these two. Undeniably, these are the signs of the coming of the "Number Hunter" named Kaito Tenjo. At that moment, a dangerous Duel with the Numbers cards on the line begins. With Kaito's power far beyond their reckoning, what can Astral or Yuma possibly do?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 The Number Hunter - Part 2
programme.desc: In just 1 Turn, Kaito Summons 2 Numbers. Yuma attempts to resist the onslaught, but all of his monsters have been removed from the field...! Kaito, capable of even more, summons the strongest Monster to exist: "Galaxy-Eyes Photon Dragon", which has never been seen before! Yuma summons "Number 39: Utopia" to create a turnaround despite the impossible odds facing him.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Having clearly seen Kaito's power, and how utterly hopeless they are, Yuma and Astral are keenly aware that they cannot easily recover. At that time, Yuma talks to his grandmother. She mentions a mysterious old man named Jurou at a "Duel Lodge" who owns a wooden statue of the Legendary Monster "Dark Magician", who is waiting for Yuma and his crew. Yuma makes a strong wish based on his desire to train and get better!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: It's a Duel against Jurou's former disciple, Yamikawa! Yamikawa draws his Ninja monsters, pinning Yuma down, but believing in the power of his friends, Yuma must continue this battle to the Death! But, Yamikawa summons his Trump Card, the Number Monster "Armed Ninja - Crimson Shadow"! However, Yuma continues to believe in the power of his friends, but can this possibly lead him to win the Duel!?
